diff --git a/src/atomic/organisms/FiltersBottomSheet/index.tsx b/src/atomic/organisms/FiltersBottomSheet/index.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..9a3e81e6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/atomic/organisms/FiltersBottomSheet/index.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,215 @@
+import {
+  BackDropBottom,
+  Box,
+  Button,
+  ChooseButton,
+  Text,
+} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import React, { FC, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
+import { Dimensions } from 'react-native';
+import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
+import { FilterOption, TYPE_LABELS, TransactionType } from '../../../services';
+
+interface FilterGroup {
+  label: string;
+  options: FilterOption[];
+}
+
+interface FiltersBottomSheetProps {
+  modalizeRef: React.RefObject<PropsModalizeRef>;
+  filterGroups: FilterGroup[];
+  onApplyFilters: (filters: any) => void;
+  initialFilters?: any;
+}
+
+interface MemoizedFilterGroupProps {
+  group: FilterGroup;
+  groupIndex: number;
+  selectedIndex: number | undefined;
+  filterItems: Array<{
+    id: number;
+    title: string;
+  }>;
+  onFilterChange: (
+    groupIndex: number,
+    options: FilterOption[],
+  ) => (item: any, index: number | number[]) => void;
+}
+
+const MemoizedFilterGroup = React.memo<MemoizedFilterGroupProps>(({
+  group,
+  groupIndex,
+  selectedIndex,
+  filterItems,
+  onFilterChange,
+}) => {
+  const filterChangeHandler = onFilterChange(groupIndex, group.options);
+
+  return (
+    <Box>
+      <Text
+        type="paragraphXL"
+        color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
+        mt={groupIndex === 0 ? 'xxxs' : 'xxs'}
+        ml="small"
+        mb="xxxs"
+      >
+        {group.label}
+      </Text>
+
+      <ChooseButton
+        items={filterItems}
+        type="select"
+        ml="small"
+        numColumns={3}
+        selectMultipleItems={false}
+        defaultOption={selectedIndex}
+        onPress={filterChangeHandler}
+      />
+    </Box>
+  );
+});
+
+const FiltersBottomSheet: FC<FiltersBottomSheetProps> = ({
+  modalizeRef,
+  filterGroups,
+  onApplyFilters,
+  initialFilters = {},
+}) => {
+  const [selectedFilters, setSelectedFilters] =
+    useState<Record<number, any>>(initialFilters);
+
+  const screenWidth = useMemo(() => Dimensions.get('window').width, []);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    setSelectedFilters(initialFilters);
+  }, [initialFilters]);
+
+  const filterItemsMap = useMemo(() => {
+    return filterGroups.map(group =>
+      group.options.map((option, idx) => ({
+        id: idx,
+        title: option.label,
+      })));
+  }, [filterGroups]);
+
+  const selectedIndices = useMemo(() => {
+    return filterGroups.map((group, groupIndex) => {
+      const selectedValue = selectedFilters[groupIndex];
+
+      if (selectedValue === undefined) {
+        return undefined;
+      }
+
+      const index = group.options.findIndex(opt => opt.value === selectedValue);
+      return index >= 0 ? index : undefined;
+    });
+  }, [
+    filterGroups,
+    selectedFilters,
+  ]);
+
+  const handleFilterChange = useCallback((
+    groupIndex: number,
+    options: FilterOption[],
+  ) => {
+    return (_item: number, index: number | number[]) => {
+      const selectedIndex = Array.isArray(index) ? index[0] : index;
+      if (selectedIndex !== undefined && selectedIndex >= 0) {
+        const value = options[selectedIndex].value;
+
+        setSelectedFilters(prev => {
+          const currentValue = prev[groupIndex];
+          const newValue = currentValue === value ? undefined : value;
+          return {
+            ...prev,
+            [groupIndex]: newValue,
+          };
+        });
+      }
+    };
+  }, []);
+
+  const handleClear = useCallback(() => {
+    modalizeRef.current?.close?.();
+
+    setTimeout(() => {
+      setSelectedFilters({});
+      onApplyFilters({});
+    }, 100);
+  }, [
+    onApplyFilters,
+    modalizeRef,
+  ]);
+
+  const handleApply = useCallback(() => {
+    const filtersToApply = selectedFilters;
+    const period = filtersToApply[0];
+    const type = filtersToApply[1];
+
+    const contentIdParts = ['filtrar'];
+    if (period) contentIdParts.push(String(period));
+    if (type) {
+      const typeLabel = TYPE_LABELS[type as TransactionType] || type;
+      contentIdParts.push(typeLabel.toLowerCase());
+    }
+
+    const contentId = contentIdParts.join('_').toLowerCase();
+
+    eventSelectContent({
+      content_type: 'cta',
+      content_id: contentId,
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'filtro_extrato_hub',
+    });
+
+    modalizeRef.current?.close?.();
+
+    setTimeout(() => {
+      onApplyFilters(filtersToApply);
+    }, 100);
+  }, [
+    selectedFilters,
+    onApplyFilters,
+    modalizeRef,
+  ]);
+
+  return (
+    <BackDropBottom modalizeRef={modalizeRef} pd="none">
+      <Box mt="xxs">
+        <Box>
+          {filterGroups.map((group, groupIndex) => (
+            <MemoizedFilterGroup
+              key={groupIndex}
+              group={group}
+              groupIndex={groupIndex}
+              selectedIndex={selectedIndices[groupIndex]}
+              filterItems={filterItemsMap[groupIndex]}
+              onFilterChange={handleFilterChange}
+            />
+          ))}
+        </Box>
+
+        <Box mt="small" direction width={screenWidth} ml="small">
+          <Button
+            text="Limpar"
+            width={screenWidth * 0.43}
+            type="secundaryMedium"
+            onPress={handleClear}
+          />
+          <Button
+            width={screenWidth * 0.43}
+            text="Filtrar"
+            type="primaryMedium"
+            ml="xs"
+            onPress={handleApply}
+          />
+        </Box>
+      </Box>
+    </BackDropBottom>
+  );
+};
+
+export default FiltersBottomSheet;

diff --git a/src/atomic/organisms/LearnMorePointsSection/index.tsx b/src/atomic/organisms/LearnMorePointsSection/index.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..4bf2c593
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/atomic/organisms/LearnMorePointsSection/index.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+import { useNavigation } from '@react-navigation/native';
+import { NativeStackNavigationProp } from '@react-navigation/native-stack';
+import React, { useCallback } from 'react';
+import { useWindowDimensions } from 'react-native';
+import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import { PropsRootStack } from '../../../routes/Models';
+import {
+  ParameterPointsProgramResponse,
+  ParameterPointsProgramStatus,
+} from '../../../services/models';
+import { sanitizeTaxonomy } from '../../../utils/functions';
+import { LearnMorePointsSectionView } from './view';
+
+export default function LearnMorePointsSection() {
+  const { data, status } = useRootStore(state => state.parameterPointsProgram);
+  const parameterPointsProgramActions = useRootStore(
+    state => state.parameterPointsProgramActions,
+  );
+  const { width } = useWindowDimensions();
+  const navigation = useNavigation<NativeStackNavigationProp<PropsRootStack>>();
+
+  const handlePress = useCallback(
+    (category: string) => {
+      const find = data?.find(
+        (item: ParameterPointsProgramResponse) =>
+          item.category.toLowerCase() === category.toLowerCase(),
+      );
+
+      if (!find || !parameterPointsProgramActions) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      parameterPointsProgramActions.setSelectedCategory(find);
+
+      eventSelectContent({
+        content_type: 'cta',
+        content_id: sanitizeTaxonomy(category),
+        location_1: 'monetizacao',
+        location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+        location_3: 'saiba_mais',
+      });
+
+      navigation.navigate('LearnMoreRewardProgram', {
+        analytics: {
+          screen_name: 'saiba_mais',
+          screen_class: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+          screen_bussines: 'monetizacao',
+          screen_info: {
+            location_1: 'monetizacao',
+            location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+            location_3: 'saiba_mais',
+          },
+        },
+      });
+    },
+    [
+      data,
+      navigation,
+      parameterPointsProgramActions,
+    ],
+  );
+
+  return (
+    <LearnMorePointsSectionView
+      data={data}
+      isLoading={status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING}
+      isError={status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR}
+      onPress={handlePress}
+      width={width}
+    />
+  );
+}

+import {
+  Box,
+  CardActivity,
+  PropsIconsNameCore,
+  Skeleton,
+  Text,
+} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import { PropsCardActivity } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/molecules/CardActivity/Models';
+import React, { FC } from 'react';
+import { FlatList } from 'react-native';
+import { ParameterPointsProgramValue } from '../../../services/models';
+import { LearnMorePointsSectionViewProps } from './Models';
+
+export const LearnMorePointsSectionView: FC<
+  LearnMorePointsSectionViewProps
+> = ({ data, isLoading, isError, onPress, width }) => {
+  if (isError) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  if (isLoading || !data || !Array.isArray(data)) {
+    return (
+      <Box>
+        <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mb="xxxs">
+          Saiba mais
+        </Text>
+        <FlatList
+          data={Array.from({ length: 4 }, (_, index) => ({
+            title: `Question ${index + 1}`,
+            icon: 'icon-question' as PropsIconsNameCore,
+          }))}
+          renderItem={() => <Skeleton width={width} height={72} mb="xxs" />}
+          keyExtractor={item => item.title}
+        />
+      </Box>
+    );
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <Box>
+      <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mb="xxxs">
+        Saiba mais
+      </Text>
+      <FlatList
+        data={data}
+        renderItem={({ item }) => (
+          <CardActivity
+            title={item.category}
+            titleTextType={'paragraphMD' as PropsCardActivity['titleTextType']}
+            mt="nano"
+            icon={(item.value as ParameterPointsProgramValue).icon}
+            onPress={() => onPress(item.category)}
+            showIcon
+            showIconRight
+            descriptionColor="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
+            iconRight="icon-next"
+            showButton={false}
+            showTagLabel={false}
+          />
+        )}
+        keyExtractor={item => item.category}
+      />
+    </Box>
+  );
+};

+import type { PropsTokenColorsCore } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import { PropsIcon } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/atoms/Icons/Models/index';
+import { PropsStatusBar } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/atoms/StatusBar/Models';
+import { ReactNode, RefObject } from 'react';
+import { ScrollView, ScrollViewProps } from 'react-native';
+
+type ColorToken = PropsTokenColorsCore;
+
+export interface BasicScreenProps {
+  children: ReactNode;
+  title: string;
+  titleColor?: string;
+  leftIcon?: PropsIcon['name'];
+  hasLeftIcon?: boolean;
+  leftIconOnPress?: () => void;
+  leftIconColor?: string;
+  rightIcon?: PropsIcon['name'];
+  rightIconColor?: string;
+  hasRightIcon?: boolean;
+  rightIconOnPress?: () => void;
+  bgColor?: ColorToken;
+  statusBarBg?: ColorToken;
+  statusBarProps?: PropsStatusBar;
+  hasScroll?: boolean;
+  scrollViewProps?: ScrollViewProps;
+  hasNativeGoBack?: boolean;
+  nativeGoBackFn?: () => void;
+  hasHeader?: boolean;
+  headerTitle?: string;
+  isLoading?: boolean;
+  testID?: string;
+  throttle?: number;
+  showValue?: boolean;
+  setShowValue?: (e: boolean) => void;
+  rightSecondaryIcon?: PropsIcon['name'];
+  rightSecondaryIconNot?: PropsIcon['name'];
+  rightSecondaryIconOnPress?: () => void;
+  errorButtonOnPress: () => void;
+  hasError?: boolean;
+  handleGoToHome?: () => void;
+  currentRouteName?: string;
+  handleClose?: () => void;
+  scrollViewRef?: RefObject<ScrollView>;
+}

+export interface ContainerProps {

+}

diff --git a/src/atomic/templates/BasicScreen/index.tsx b/src/atomic/templates/BasicScreen/index.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..058f8f8d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/atomic/templates/BasicScreen/index.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,69 @@
+import React, { FC, useEffect } from 'react';
+import { BackHandler } from 'react-native';
+
+import {
+  NavigationProp,
+  useNavigation,
+  useNavigationState,
+} from '@react-navigation/native';
+import { eventModalView } from '~/constants/functions';
+import { PropsRootStack } from '../../../routes/Models';
+import { BasicScreenProps } from './Models';
+import BasicScreenView from './view';
+
+const BasicScreen: FC<BasicScreenProps> = ({
+  hasNativeGoBack = true,
+  nativeGoBackFn,
+  ...props
+}) => {
+  const navigation = useNavigation<NavigationProp<PropsRootStack>>();
+
+  const currentRouteName = useNavigationState(state => {
+    const route = state.routes[state.index];
+    return route.name;
+  });
+
+  const nativeGoBackHandler = () => {
+    if (!hasNativeGoBack) return true;
+
+    if (nativeGoBackFn) {
+      nativeGoBackFn();
+      return true;
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleGoToHome = () => {
+    navigation.navigate('HomeScreen' as never);
+  };
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (props.hasError) {
+      eventModalView({
+        content_id: `erro_generico_${currentRouteName}`,
+        screen_bussines: 'monetizacao',
+        location_1: 'monetizacao',
+        location_2: 'spmais',
+        location_3: currentRouteName,
+      });
+    }
+  }, [props.hasError]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const backHandler = BackHandler.addEventListener(
+      'hardwareBackPress',
+      nativeGoBackHandler,
+    );
+
+    return () => backHandler.remove();
+  }, []);
+
+  return (
+    <BasicScreenView
+      handleGoToHome={handleGoToHome}
+      currentRouteName={currentRouteName}
+      {...props}
+    />
+  );
+};
+
+export default BasicScreen;

+import {
+  Box,
+  Header,
+  Icon,
+  Modal,
+  StatusBar,
+} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import { ModalLoadingBox, Text } from '@semparar/design-system-app/fintech';
+import type { PropsStatusBar } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/atoms/StatusBar/Models';
+import type { PropsHeader } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/molecules/Header/Models';
+import React, { FC } from 'react';
+import { ScrollView } from 'react-native';
+
+import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
+import WrapperKeyboardAvoiding from '../WrapperKeyboardAvoiding';
+import { BasicScreenViewProps } from './Models';
+import { Container, Overlay } from './styles';
+
+const BasicScreenView: FC<BasicScreenViewProps> = ({
+  children,
+  title = '',
+  hasLeftIcon = true,
+  leftIcon = 'icon-back',
+  leftIconOnPress = () => {},
+  hasRightIcon = false,
+  rightIcon = 'icon-close',
+  rightIconOnPress = () => {},
+  statusBarBg = 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+  statusBarProps = {
+    barStyle: 'light-content',
+  },
+  isLoading = false,
+  bgColor = 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03',
+  hasScroll = false,
+  hasHeader = true,
+  headerTitle,
+  scrollViewProps,
+  titleColor,
+  leftIconColor,
+  rightIconColor,
+  rightSecondaryIcon,
+  rightSecondaryIconNot,
+  testID,
+  throttle,
+  scrollViewRef,
+  showValue,
+  setShowValue,
+  errorButtonOnPress,
+  currentRouteName,
+  handleGoToHome,
+  hasError,
+  handleClose,
+}) => {
+  return (
+    <WrapperKeyboardAvoiding>
+      <ModalLoadingBox
+        onClose={() => null}
+        visible={isLoading}
+        numberOfLines={1}
+        title="Aguarde..."
+      />
+      <Container testID={testID} bgColor={bgColor}>
+        <StatusBar
+          bgColor={statusBarBg as PropsStatusBar['bgColor']}
+          {...statusBarProps}
+        />
+        {hasHeader ? (
+          <Header
+            title={title}
+            iconLeft={leftIcon}
+            iconRight={rightIcon}
+            hideLeftIcon={!hasLeftIcon}
+            isOption={hasRightIcon}
+            onBack={leftIconOnPress}
+            onPressIconRight={rightIconOnPress}
+            titleColor={titleColor as PropsHeader['titleColor']}
+            iconColorLeft={leftIconColor as PropsHeader['iconColorLeft']}
+            iconColorOnOption={
+              rightIconColor as PropsHeader['iconColorOnOption']
+            }
+            testID="icon-home-button"
+          />
+        ) : null}
+        {headerTitle ? (
+          <Box
+            width="100%"
+            bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+            pd="innerLarge"
+            direction
+            justify="space-between"
+          >
+            <Text type="subtitleXXXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02">
+              {headerTitle}
+            </Text>
+            <Box direction justify="space-between">
+              {rightSecondaryIcon && (
+                <Icon
+                  mr="middle"
+                  onPress={() => setShowValue?.(!showValue)}
+                  name={showValue ? rightSecondaryIcon : rightSecondaryIconNot}
+                  color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
+                />
+              )}
+              <Icon
+                name={rightIcon}
+                color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
+                onPress={rightIconOnPress}
+              />
+            </Box>
+          </Box>
+        ) : null}
+        {hasScroll ? (
+          <ScrollView
+            ref={scrollViewRef}
+            {...scrollViewProps}
+            scrollEnabled={hasScroll}
+            scrollEventThrottle={throttle ?? 0}
+            contentContainerStyle={{ flexGrow: 1 }}
+          >
+            {children}
+          </ScrollView>
+        ) : (
+          children
+        )}
+
+        {hasError && (
+          <Overlay>
+            <Modal
+              iconBgColor="DENY_COLOR_03"
+              visible={hasError}
+              icon="icon-circle-alert"
+              onPressFirstButton={() => {
+                eventSelectContent({
+                  content_type: 'cta',
+                  content_id: 'tentar_novamente_erro',
+                  location_1: 'monetizacao',
+                  location_2: 'spmais',
+                  location_3: currentRouteName ?? '',
+                });
+                errorButtonOnPress();
+              }}
+              onPressSecondButton={handleGoToHome}
+              textFirstButton="Tentar novamente"
+              textSecondButton="Voltar para Home"
+              subTitle="Ops, algo deu errado..."
+              colorSubtitle="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              iconColor="DENY_COLOR_01"
+              testID="modalApiError"
+              description="Por favor, tente novamente."
+              onClose={handleClose}
+            />
+          </Overlay>
+        )}
+      </Container>
+    </WrapperKeyboardAvoiding>
+  );
+};
+
+export default BasicScreenView;

+import { Box, Loading } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import React from 'react';
+import { Platform, useWindowDimensions } from 'react-native';
+import { WebView } from 'react-native-webview';
+import ApiError from '../../organisms/ApiError';
+import BasicScreen from '../BasicScreen';
+import type { WebViewScreenProps } from './Models';
+
+const WebViewScreenView = (props: WebViewScreenProps) => {
+  const { uri, title, webViewRef, onBackPress, onError, onRetry } = props;
+  const { width, height } = useWindowDimensions();
+
+  return (
+    <BasicScreen
+      leftIconOnPress={onBackPress}
+      rightIcon="icon-close"
+      hasScroll={false}
+      title={title}
+      errorButtonOnPress={onRetry}
+      scrollViewProps={{
+        nestedScrollEnabled: true,
+      }}
+    >
+      <Box index={1001} width="100%" flex={1}>
+        <WebView
+          ref={webViewRef as React.RefObject<WebView>}
+          source={{ uri }}
+          style={{
+            width,
+            height,
+          }}
+          startInLoadingState
+          onError={onError}
+          mixedContentMode="compatibility"
+          allowsInlineMediaPlayback
+          mediaPlaybackRequiresUserAction={false}
+          domStorageEnabled
+          javaScriptEnabled
+          thirdPartyCookiesEnabled
+          sharedCookiesEnabled
+          allowsBackForwardNavigationGestures
+          bounces={false}
+          scrollEnabled={true}
+          nestedScrollEnabled={Platform.OS === 'android'}
+          originWhitelist={['*']}
+          scalesPageToFit={Platform.OS === 'android'}
+          renderLoading={() => <Loading title="Carregando..." visible />}
+          renderError={() => (
+            <Box
+              justify="center"
+              align="center"
+              width="100%"
+              height="100%"
+              pd="innerGreat"
+            >
+              <ApiError onPress={onRetry} />
+            </Box>
+          )}
+        />
+      </Box>
+    </BasicScreen>
+  );
+};
+
+export default WebViewScreenView;

@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+import { PointsProduct } from '../../../../services/models';
+
+export const normalizeName = (value: unknown): string => {
+  if (typeof value === 'string') {
+    return value
+      .trim()
+      .toLowerCase()
+      .normalize('NFD')
+      .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '');
+  }
+
+  if (value === null || value === undefined) {
+    return '';
+  }
+
+  if (typeof value === 'number' || typeof value === 'boolean') {
+    return String(value)
+      .trim()
+      .toLowerCase()
+      .normalize('NFD')
+      .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '');
+  }
+
+  return '';
+};
+
+export const extractRawProducts = (
+  pointsOptions: PointsProduct[] | undefined,
+): PointsProduct[] => {
+  if (!Array.isArray(pointsOptions)) {
+    return [];
+  }
+  return Array.isArray(pointsOptions[1]) ? pointsOptions[1] : pointsOptions;
+};
+
+export const isValidProduct = (product: unknown): product is PointsProduct => {
+  return (
+    product !== null &&
+    typeof product === 'object' &&
+    'name' in product &&
+    typeof (product as PointsProduct).name === 'string'
+  );
+};

@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+import {
+  OnPressHandler,
+  PointsCardItem,
+} from '../../../../screens/Points/Models';
+
+export class PointsCardItemBuilder {
+  private id: number = 0;
+  private text: string = '';
+  private bgColor: string = 'INTENSE_COLOR_01';
+  private icon: string = 'icon-default';
+  private textAlign: string = 'right';
+  private iconColor: string = 'BRAND_BASE_01';
+  private onPress: OnPressHandler = () => {};
+
+  setId(id: number): this {
+    this.id = id;
+    return this;
+  }
+
+  setText(text: string): this {
+    this.text = text;
+    return this;
+  }
+
+  setBgColor(bgColor: string): this {
+    this.bgColor = bgColor;
+    return this;
+  }
+
+  setIcon(icon: string): this {
+    this.icon = icon;
+    return this;
+  }
+
+  setTextAlign(textAlign: string): this {
+    this.textAlign = textAlign;
+    return this;
+  }
+
+  setIconColor(iconColor: string): this {
+    this.iconColor = iconColor;
+    return this;
+  }
+
+  setOnPress(onPress: OnPressHandler): this {
+    this.onPress = onPress;
+    return this;
+  }
+
+  build(): PointsCardItem {
+    return {
+      id: this.id,
+      text: this.text,
+      bgColor: this.bgColor as PointsCardItem['bgColor'],
+      icon: this.icon as PointsCardItem['icon'],
+      textAlign: this.textAlign as PointsCardItem['textAlign'],
+      iconColor: this.iconColor as PointsCardItem['iconColor'],
+      onPress: this.onPress,
+    };
+  }
+
+  reset(): this {
+    this.id = 0;
+    this.text = '';
+    this.bgColor = 'INTENSE_COLOR_01';
+    this.icon = 'icon-default';
+    this.textAlign = 'right';
+    this.iconColor = 'BRAND_BASE_01';
+    this.onPress = () => {};
+    return this;
+  }
+
+  static getInstance(): PointsCardItemBuilder {
+    return new PointsCardItemBuilder();
+  }
+}
diff --git a/src/hooks/custom/useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints/index.ts b/src/hooks/custom/useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints/index.ts
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..dba73356
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/hooks/custom/useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints/index.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,142 @@
+import { NavigationProp, useNavigation } from '@react-navigation/native';
+import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
+import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
+import { PropsRootStack } from '../../../routes/Models';
+import {
+  KEY_NAME_TO_ICON,
+  NAME_TO_ICON,
+  getNormalizedKeyName,
+} from '../../../screens/Points/data';
+import { PointsCardItem } from '../../../screens/Points/Models';
+import { usePermission } from '../../../services';
+import { PointsProduct } from '../../../services/models';
+import { extractRawProducts, isValidProduct, normalizeName } from './data';
+import { PointsCardItemBuilder } from './data/pointsCardItemBuilder';
+
+export const useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints = () => {
+  const navigation = useNavigation<NavigationProp<PropsRootStack>>();
+  const { checkHasRedeemed } = usePermission();
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    checkHasRedeemed().catch(() => {});
+  }, [checkHasRedeemed]);
+
+  const onPressKeyName = useMemo(
+    () => ({
+      [normalizeName(KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MARKETPLACE)]: () => {
+        navigation.navigate('RewardProgramMarketplace');
+      },
+      [normalizeName(KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FUEL_VOUCHER)]: () => {},
+      [normalizeName(KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MONTHLY_DISCOUNT)]: () => {},
+      [normalizeName(KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.CAR_INSURANCE_DISCOUNT)]: () => {},
+      [normalizeName(KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.PARKING_DISCOUNT)]: () => {},
+      [normalizeName(KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FINES_DISCOUNT)]: () => {},
+      [normalizeName(KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.IPVA_DISCOUNT)]: () => {},
+      [normalizeName(KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.AIRLINE_MILES)]: () => {
+        navigation.navigate('AirlineMilesMarketplace');
+      },
+    }),
+    [navigation],
+  );
+
+  const handleOnPress = useCallback(
+    (keyName: string) => {
+      return () => {
+        if (keyName in onPressKeyName) {
+          onPressKeyName[keyName]();
+          const contentIdName = getNormalizedKeyName(keyName)
+            .split(' ')
+            .join('_')
+            .toLowerCase();
+
+          eventSelectContent({
+            content_type: 'cta',
+            content_id: `onde_usar_${contentIdName}`,
+            location_1: 'monetizacao',
+            location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+            location_3: 'home_hub_recompensas',
+          });
+        }
+      };
+    },
+    [onPressKeyName],
+  );
+
+  const buildPointsCardItems = useCallback(
+    (pointsOptions: PointsProduct[] | undefined): PointsCardItem[] => {
+      const rawProducts = extractRawProducts(pointsOptions);
+      const builder = PointsCardItemBuilder.getInstance();
+
+      return rawProducts.filter(isValidProduct).map((product, index) => {
+        const normalizedName = normalizeName(product.name);
+        const icon = NAME_TO_ICON[normalizedName] || 'icon-default';
+
+        const isCashbackInInvoice =
+          normalizedName === normalizeName(KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.RESCUE_IN_INVOICE);
+        const onPress = isCashbackInInvoice
+          ? async () => {
+              eventSelectContent({
+                content_type: 'cta',
+                content_id: `onde_usar_cashback_na_fatura`,
+                location_1: 'monetizacao',
+                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+                location_3: 'home_hub_recompensas',
+              });
+              const rawCF =
+                (product as any).conversionFactor ??
+                (product as any).convertionFactor ??
+                0;
+              const conversionFactor = (() => {
+                if (typeof rawCF === 'number') return rawCF;
+                if (typeof rawCF === 'string') {
+                  const n = Number(
+                    String(rawCF)
+                      .replace(',', '.')
+                      .replace(/[^0-9.-]/g, ''),
+                  );
+                  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0;
+                }
+                return 0;
+              })();
+              const productCode =
+                (product as any).productCode ?? (product as any).code;
+              const campaingId =
+                (product as any).campaingId ??
+                (product as any).campaignId ??
+                undefined;
+
+              const hasRedeemed = await checkHasRedeemed();
+              if (hasRedeemed) {
+                navigation.navigate('InvoiceCashbackPoints', {
+                  conversionFactor,
+                  productCode,
+                  campaingId,
+                });
+              } else {
+                navigation.navigate('InvoiceCashbackOnboarding', {
+                  conversionFactor,
+                  productCode,
+                  campaingId,
+                });
+              }
+            }
+          : handleOnPress(normalizedName);
+
+        return builder
+          .reset()
+          .setId(index + 1)
+          .setText(product.name)
+          .setIcon(icon)
+          .setOnPress(onPress)
+          .build();
+      });
+    },
+    [
+      handleOnPress,
+      checkHasRedeemed,
+      navigation,
+    ],
+  );
+
+  return buildPointsCardItems;
+};

+import { RouteProp, useIsFocused } from '@react-navigation/native';
+import { useEffect } from 'react';
+
+import { eventScreenViewV2, eventScreenViewV3 } from '~/constants/functions';
+import { PropsRootStack } from '../../routes/Models';
+
+interface Props {
+  route: RouteProp<PropsRootStack, any>;
+  analytic?: string;
+  title: string;
+  handleAfterDispatch?: () => void;
+}
+
+export const useScreenViewTracking = ({
+  route,
+  analytic,
+  title,
+  handleAfterDispatch,
+}: Props) => {
+  const isFocused = useIsFocused();
+
+  const dispatchEventFocus = () => {
+    const analytics = route?.params?.analytics;
+
+    if (analytics) {
+      const screen_info = analytics?.screen_info;
+      const screen_name = analytics?.screen_name;
+      const screen_class = analytics?.screen_class;
+      const screen_bussines = analytics?.screen_business;
+      eventScreenViewV3(
+        screen_name,
+        screen_class,
+        screen_bussines,
+        screen_info,
+      );
+    } else {
+      analytic
+        ? eventScreenViewV2(analytic)
+        : title && eventScreenViewV2(title);
+    }
+    handleAfterDispatch?.();
+  };
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (isFocused) {
+      dispatchEventFocus();
+    }
+  }, [isFocused]);
+};
diff --git a/src/hooks/useDebounce.ts b/src/hooks/useDebounce.ts

index 00000000..7cf704dd
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/hooks/useDebounce.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
+
+function useDebounce<T>(
+  inicialValue: T,
+  delay = 500,
+): [T, React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<T>>, T] {
+  const [value, setValue] = useState<T>(inicialValue);
+  const [debouncedValue, setDebouncedValue] = useState<T>(inicialValue);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
+      setDebouncedValue(value);
+    }, delay);
+
+    return () => {
+      clearTimeout(timer);
+    };
+  }, [
+    value,
+    delay,
+  ]);
+
+  return [
+    value,
+    setValue,
+    debouncedValue,
+  ];
+}
+
+export default useDebounce;

+import { useFocusEffect } from '@react-navigation/native';
+import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
+import type { WebViewProps } from '../../atomic/templates/WebViewScreen/Models';
+import { useScreenViewTracking } from '../../hooks/tracking';
+import { useAirlineMiles } from '../../services';
+import type {
+  AirlineMilesMarketplaceScreenProps,
+  UseAirlineMilesMarketplaceReturn,
+} from './Models';
+
+export function useAirlineMilesMarketplace(
+  props: AirlineMilesMarketplaceScreenProps,
+): UseAirlineMilesMarketplaceReturn {
+  const { navigation, route } = props;
+  useScreenViewTracking({
+    route,
+    title: 'Milhas Aéreas',
+  });
+
+  const [isWebViewError, setIsWebViewError] = useState(false);
+  const webViewRef = useRef<WebViewProps>(null);
+
+  const { redirectURL, isLoading, isError, fetchAirlineMilesToken, reset } =
+    useAirlineMiles();
+
+  useFocusEffect(
+    useCallback(() => {
+      let isActive = true;
+
+      const fetchData = async () => {
+        if (isActive) {
+          setIsWebViewError(false);
+        }
+        await fetchAirlineMilesToken();
+      };
+
+      fetchData();
+
+      return () => {
+        isActive = false;
+      };
+    }, [fetchAirlineMilesToken]),
+  );
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    return () => {
+      reset();
+    };
+  }, [reset]);
+
+  const handleGoBack = useCallback(() => {
+    navigation.goBack();
+  }, [navigation]);
+
+  const handleWebViewError = useCallback(() => {
+    setIsWebViewError(true);
+  }, []);
+
+  const handleRetry = useCallback(() => {
+    setIsWebViewError(false);
+    fetchAirlineMilesToken();
+  }, [fetchAirlineMilesToken]);
+
+  return {
+    isWebViewError,
+    redirectURL,
+    isLoading,
+    isError,
+    webViewRef,
+    handleGoBack,
+    handleWebViewError,
+    handleRetry,
+  };
+}
+
+export { default } from './view';

+import React from 'react';
+import AnimationArrows from '../../atomic/atoms/AnimationArrows';
+import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
+import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
+import { WebViewScreen } from '../../atomic/templates/WebViewScreen';
+import { useAirlineMilesMarketplace } from './index';
+import type { AirlineMilesMarketplaceScreenProps } from './Models';
+
+const SCREEN_TITLE = 'Milhas Aéreas';
+
+export default function AirlineMilesMarketplaceScreen(
+  props: AirlineMilesMarketplaceScreenProps,
+) {
+  const {
+    isWebViewError,
+    redirectURL,
+    isLoading,
+    isError,
+    webViewRef,
+    handleGoBack,
+    handleWebViewError,
+    handleRetry,
+  } = useAirlineMilesMarketplace(props);
+
+  if (isLoading) {
+    return <AnimationArrows />;
+  }
+
+  if (isError || !redirectURL || isWebViewError) {
+    return (
+      <BasicScreen
+        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
+        title={SCREEN_TITLE}
+        errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry}
+      >
+        <ApiError onPress={handleRetry} />
+      </BasicScreen>
+    );
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <WebViewScreen
+      uri={redirectURL}
+      title={SCREEN_TITLE}
+      webViewRef={webViewRef}
+      onBackPress={handleGoBack}
+      onError={handleWebViewError}
+      onRetry={handleRetry}
+    />
+  );
+}

+import { useFocusEffect } from '@react-navigation/native';
+import type { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import type { propsItemsListCardTransition } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/organisms/ListCardTransition/Models';

+import type {

+} from './Models';

+  getFilteredTransactions,
+  getFilteredTransactionsByText,
+} from './utils';
+
+const SCROLL_THRESHOLD = 300;
+
+export function useExtractRewardProgramScreen(
+  params?: ExtractRewardProgramProps,
+): UseExtractRewardProgramReturn {
+  const hasTrackedScreenView = useRef(false);
+  const hasTrackedSearchPress = useRef(false);
+  const canLoadMoreRef = useRef(false);
+  const isLoadingMoreRef = useRef(false);
+
+  const modalizeRefInfo = useRef<PropsModalizeRef>(
+    null as unknown as PropsModalizeRef,
+  );
+  const modalizeRefFilters = useRef<PropsModalizeRef>(
+    null as unknown as PropsModalizeRef,
+  );
+
+  const [isRefreshing, setIsRefreshing] = useState(false);
+  const [transactionsData, setTransactionsData] = useState<
+    propsItemsListCardTransition[]
+  >([]);
+  const [searchText, setSearchText, debouncedSearchText] = useDebounce('', 400);
+
+  const {
+    pointsExtract,
+    pointsBalance,
+    pointsExtractFilters,
+    pointsExtractActions,
+  } = useRootStore(
+    useShallow(state => ({
+      pointsExtract: state.pointsExtract,
+      pointsBalance: state.pointsBalance,
+      pointsExtractFilters: state.pointsExtractFilters,
+      pointsExtractActions: state.pointsExtractActions,
+    })),
+  );
+
+  const isLoadingExtract = pointsExtract.status === PointsExtractStatus.LOADING;
+  const isLoadingMore = pointsExtract.isLoadingMore;
+  const isLoadingBalance = pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.LOADING;
+  const appliedTransactionsFilters =
+    pointsExtractFilters.appliedTransactionsFilters;
+  const hasError =
+    pointsExtract.status === PointsExtractStatus.ERROR &&
+    !isLoadingExtract &&
+    (!pointsExtract.extractData ||
+      !pointsExtract.extractData.transactions?.length);
+
+  useFocusEffect(
+    useCallback(() => {
+      if (!hasTrackedScreenView.current) {
+        eventScreenViewV3(
+          ANALYTICS_EVENTS.SCREEN_VIEW.screen_name,
+          ANALYTICS_EVENTS.SCREEN_VIEW.screen_class,
+          ANALYTICS_EVENTS.SCREEN_VIEW.screen_bussines,
+          {
+            location_1: ANALYTICS_EVENTS.SCREEN_VIEW.location_1,
+            location_2: ANALYTICS_EVENTS.SCREEN_VIEW.location_2,
+            location_3: ANALYTICS_EVENTS.SCREEN_VIEW.location_3,
+          },
+        );
+        hasTrackedScreenView.current = true;
+      }
+
+      return () => {
+        hasTrackedScreenView.current = false;
+      };
+    }, []),
+  );
+
+  const refreshExtractData = useCallback(() => {
+    pointsExtractActions.setExtractStatus(PointsExtractStatus.IDLE);
+    pointsExtractActions.setBalanceStatus(PointsBalanceStatus.IDLE);
+    pointsExtractActions.setLoadingMore(false);
+    getPointsBalance();
+    getPointsExtract({ page: EXTRACT_CONSTANTS.DEFAULT_PAGE });
+  }, [pointsExtractActions]);
+
+  useFocusEffect(
+    useCallback(() => {
+      refreshExtractData();
+    }, [refreshExtractData]),
+  );
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const shouldFetchBalance =
+      pointsBalance.points === undefined ||
+      pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.ERROR;
+
+    if (shouldFetchBalance) {
+      getPointsBalance();
+    }
+
+    getPointsExtract({ page: EXTRACT_CONSTANTS.DEFAULT_PAGE });
+  }, [
+    pointsBalance.points,
+    pointsBalance.status,
+  ]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (!isLoadingExtract && isRefreshing) {
+      setIsRefreshing(false);
+    }
+  }, [
+    isLoadingExtract,
+    isRefreshing,
+  ]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (searchText.length === 0) {
+      hasTrackedSearchPress.current = false;
+    }
+  }, [searchText]);
+
+  const getPointsAvailable = useMemo(() => {
+    return pointsBalance.points ?? 0;
+  }, [pointsBalance.points]);
+
+  const handleGoBack = useCallback(() => {
+    params?.navigation?.goBack();
+  }, [params?.navigation]);
+
+  const requestPointsExtract = useCallback(() => {
+    getPointsExtract({ page: EXTRACT_CONSTANTS.DEFAULT_PAGE });
+  }, []);
+
+  const handleLoadMore = useCallback(() => {
+    const currentPage = pointsExtract.extractData?.pagination?.page ?? 1;
+    const totalPages = pointsExtract.extractData?.pagination?.totalPages ?? 1;
+    const canLoadMore =
+      currentPage < totalPages && !pointsExtract.isLoadingMore;
+
+    if (canLoadMore) {
+      getPointsExtract({ page: currentPage + 1 });
+    }
+  }, [
+    pointsExtract.extractData?.pagination,
+    pointsExtract.isLoadingMore,
+  ]);
+
+  const setTransactionsFilters = useCallback(
+    (filters: AppliedFilters) => {
+      pointsExtractActions.setTransactionsFilters(filters);
+    },
+    [pointsExtractActions],
+  );
+
+  const clearTransactionsFilters = useCallback(() => {
+    pointsExtractActions.clearTransactionsFilters();
+  }, [pointsExtractActions]);
+
+  const getTransactionsWithFilters = useCallback(
+    (transactions: PointsTransaction[]): PointsTransaction[] => {
+      let filtered = transactions;
+
+      if (appliedTransactionsFilters) {
+        const filtersWithDays: AppliedFilters = {
+          ...appliedTransactionsFilters,
+          period:
+            appliedTransactionsFilters.period !== undefined
+              ? PERIOD_DAYS_MAP[appliedTransactionsFilters.period]
+              : undefined,
+        };
+        filtered = getFilteredTransactions(filtered, filtersWithDays);
+      }
+
+      return filtered;
+    },
+    [appliedTransactionsFilters],
+  );
+
+  const getExtractData = useMemo(() => {
+    if (!pointsExtract.extractData) return undefined;
+
+    const transactions = getTransactionsWithFilters(
+      pointsExtract.extractData.transactions,
+    );
+
+    return {
+      ...pointsExtract.extractData,
+      transactions,
+    };
+  }, [
+    pointsExtract.extractData,
+    getTransactionsWithFilters,
+  ]);
+
+  const getTransactionsData = useMemo(() => {
+    if (!getExtractData?.transactions) {
+      return [];
+    }
+
+    if (debouncedSearchText && debouncedSearchText.trim() !== '') {
+      return getFilteredTransactionsByText(
+        getExtractData.transactions,
+        debouncedSearchText,
+        false,
+      );
+    }
+
+    return getExtractData.transactions;
+  }, [
+    getExtractData?.transactions,
+    debouncedSearchText,
+  ]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (!getExtractData) return;
+
+    let cancelled = false;
+    const task = InteractionManager.runAfterInteractions(() => {
+      if (cancelled) return;
+      const processed = processPointsExtractData({
+        transactions: getTransactionsData,
+        pagination: getExtractData.pagination ?? {
+          page: 1,
+          pageSize: 100,
+          total: 0,
+          totalPages: 0,
+        },
+      });
+      if (!cancelled) {
+        setTransactionsData(processed.mappedTransactions);
+      }
+    });
+
+    return () => {
+      cancelled = true;
+      task.cancel();
+    };
+  }, [
+    getExtractData,
+    getTransactionsData,
+  ]);
+
+  const getActiveFiltersCount = useMemo(() => {
+    let count = 0;
+    if (
+      appliedTransactionsFilters?.period !== undefined &&
+      appliedTransactionsFilters?.period !== null
+    ) {
+      count++;
+    }
+    if (appliedTransactionsFilters?.types?.length) count++;
+    return count > 0 ? count.toString() : undefined;
+  }, [appliedTransactionsFilters]);
+
+  const getTransactionsEmptyMessage = useMemo(() => {
+    const hasSearchText =
+      debouncedSearchText && debouncedSearchText.trim() !== '';
+    const hasActiveFilters =
+      (appliedTransactionsFilters?.period !== undefined &&
+        appliedTransactionsFilters?.period !== null) ||
+      (appliedTransactionsFilters?.types?.length ?? 0) > 0;
+    return hasSearchText || hasActiveFilters
+      ? SCREEN_STRINGS.EMPTY_SEARCH_RESULTS
+      : SCREEN_STRINGS.EMPTY_ALL_LIST;
+  }, [
+    debouncedSearchText,
+    appliedTransactionsFilters,
+  ]);
+
+  const getShouldShowTransactionsList =
+    isLoadingExtract || transactionsData.length > 0;
+
+  const canLoadMore =
+    pointsExtract.extractData?.pagination &&
+    pointsExtract.extractData.pagination.page <
+      pointsExtract.extractData.pagination.totalPages;
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    canLoadMoreRef.current = !!canLoadMore;
+  }, [canLoadMore]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    isLoadingMoreRef.current = isLoadingMore;
+  }, [isLoadingMore]);
+
+  const handleSearchChange = useCallback(
+    (text: string) => {
+      setSearchText(text);
+    },
+    [setSearchText],
+  );
+
+  const handleRefresh = useCallback(() => {
+    setIsRefreshing(true);
+    pointsExtractActions.setBalanceStatus(PointsBalanceStatus.IDLE);
+    getPointsBalance();
+    requestPointsExtract();
+  }, [
+    requestPointsExtract,
+    pointsExtractActions,
+  ]);
+
+  const handleError = useCallback(() => {
+    requestPointsExtract();
+  }, [requestPointsExtract]);
+
+  const handleScroll = useCallback(
+    (event: NativeSyntheticEvent<NativeScrollEvent>) => {
+      const { layoutMeasurement, contentOffset, contentSize } =
+        event.nativeEvent;
+      const distanceFromBottom =
+        contentSize.height - layoutMeasurement.height - contentOffset.y;
+
+      if (
+        distanceFromBottom < SCROLL_THRESHOLD &&
+        canLoadMoreRef.current &&
+        !isLoadingMoreRef.current
+      ) {
+        handleLoadMore();
+      }
+    },
+    [handleLoadMore],
+  );
+
+  const handleIconInfoPress = useCallback(() => {
+    eventSelectContent(ANALYTICS_EVENTS.POINTS_INFO);
+    modalizeRefInfo.current?.open?.();
+  }, []);
+
+  const handleFilterIconPress = useCallback(() => {
+    eventSelectContent({
+      content_type: 'cta',
+      ...ANALYTICS_EVENTS.FILTER,
+    });
+    modalizeRefFilters.current?.open?.();
+  }, []);
+
+  const handleApplyFilters = useCallback(
+    (filters: Record<number, unknown>) => {
+      const period = filters[0] as number | undefined;
+      const types = filters[1] as string | undefined;
+
+      const hasPeriod = period !== undefined && period !== null;
+      const hasTypes = types !== undefined && types !== null;
+
+      if (!hasPeriod && !hasTypes) {
+        clearTransactionsFilters();
+      } else {
+        setTransactionsFilters({
+          period: hasPeriod ? period : undefined,
+          types: hasTypes ? [types] : undefined,
+        });
+      }
+    },
+    [
+      setTransactionsFilters,
+      clearTransactionsFilters,
+    ],
+  );
+
+  const handleTabChange = useCallback((index: number) => {
+    if (index === 0) {
+      eventSelectContent({
+        content_type: 'cta',
+        content_id: 'aba_todos',
+        location_1: 'monetizacao',
+        location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+        location_3: 'extrato_hub_recompensas',
+      });
+    } else {
+      eventSelectContent({
+        content_type: 'cta',
+        content_id: 'aba_expirados',
+        location_1: 'monetizacao',
+        location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+        location_3: 'extrato_hub_recompensas',
+      });
+    }
+  }, []);
+
+  const handleSearchPressIn = useCallback(() => {
+    if (!hasTrackedSearchPress.current) {
+      eventSelectContent(ANALYTICS_EVENTS.SEARCH);
+      hasTrackedSearchPress.current = true;
+    }
+  }, []);
+
+  const getFilterGroups: FilterGroup[] = useMemo(() => {
+    return [
+      {
+        label: 'Períodos',
+        options: [
+          {
+            label: '7 dias',
+            value: 0,
+          },
+          {
+            label: '15 dias',
+            value: 1,
+          },
+          {
+            label: '30 dias',
+            value: 2,
+          },
+          {
+            label: '60 dias',
+            value: 3,
+          },
+          {
+            label: '90 dias',
+            value: 4,
+          },
+        ],
+      },
+      {
+        label: 'Tipos de lançamentos',
+        options: [
+          {
+            label: 'Ganhos',
+            value: 'CREDIT',
+          },
+          {
+            label: 'Usados',
+            value: 'RESCUE',
+          },
+          {
+            label: 'Expirados',
+            value: 'EXPIRED',
+          },
+        ],
+      },
+    ];
+  }, []);
+
+  const getInitialFilters = useMemo(() => {
+    const filters: Record<number, unknown> = {};
+    if (
+      appliedTransactionsFilters?.period !== undefined &&
+      appliedTransactionsFilters?.period !== null
+    ) {
+      filters[0] = appliedTransactionsFilters.period;
+    }
+    if (appliedTransactionsFilters?.types?.length) {
+      filters[1] = appliedTransactionsFilters.types[0];
+    }
+    return filters;
+  }, [appliedTransactionsFilters]);
+
+  return {
+    pointsAvailable: getPointsAvailable,
+    extractData: getExtractData,
+    pagination: pointsExtract.extractData?.pagination,
+    isLoadingExtract,
+    isLoadingMore,
+    isLoadingBalance,
+    hasError,
+    appliedTransactionsFilters,
+    isRefreshing,
+    transactionsData,
+    searchText,
+    activeFiltersCount: getActiveFiltersCount,
+    transactionsEmptyMessage: getTransactionsEmptyMessage,
+    shouldShowTransactionsList: getShouldShowTransactionsList,
+    filterGroups: getFilterGroups,
+    initialFilters: getInitialFilters,
+    modalizeRefInfo,
+    modalizeRefFilters,
+    handleGoBack,
+    requestPointsExtract,
+    handleLoadMore,
+    setTransactionsFilters,
+    clearTransactionsFilters,
+    handleSearchChange,
+    handleRefresh,
+    handleError,
+    handleScroll,
+    handleIconInfoPress,
+    handleFilterIconPress,
+    handleApplyFilters,
+    handleTabChange,
+    handleSearchPressIn,
+  };
+}
+
+export { getPlaceholder } from './utils';
+export { default } from './view';
diff --git a/src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/utils.ts b/src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/utils.ts

index 00000000..7c81c32f
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/utils.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+import {
+  AppliedFilters,
+  PointsTransaction,
+  TransactionType,
+  TYPE_LABELS,
+} from '../../services';
+
+function getTransactionDescription(type: TransactionType): string {
+  return TYPE_LABELS[type] || '';
+}
+
+function matchesPeriodFilter(
+  transactionDate: Date,
+  periodStart: Date | null,
+  todayEnd: Date,
+): boolean {
+  if (!periodStart) return true;
+  return transactionDate >= periodStart && transactionDate <= todayEnd;
+}
+
+function matchesTypeFilter(
+  transactionType: string,
+  typesSet: Set<string> | null,
+): boolean {
+  if (!typesSet) return true;
+  return typesSet.has(transactionType.toUpperCase());
+}
+
+export function getFilteredTransactions(
+  transactions: PointsTransaction[],
+  filters?: AppliedFilters,
+): PointsTransaction[] {
+  if (
+    !filters ||
+    (!filters.period && (!filters.types || filters.types.length === 0))
+  ) {
+    return transactions;
+  }
+
+  const now = new Date();
+  const todayEnd = new Date(now);
+  todayEnd.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
+
+  const periodStart = filters.period
+    ? (() => {
+        const date = new Date(now);
+        date.setDate(date.getDate() - filters.period);
+        date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
+        return date;
+      })()
+    : null;
+
+  const hasTypeFilter = filters.types && filters.types.length > 0;
+  const typesSet = hasTypeFilter
+    ? new Set(filters.types!.map(type => type.toUpperCase()))
+    : null;
+
+  return transactions.filter(transaction => {
+    const transactionDate = new Date(transaction.date);
+
+    if (!matchesPeriodFilter(transactionDate, periodStart, todayEnd)) {
+      return false;
+    }
+
+    if (!matchesTypeFilter(transaction.type, typesSet)) {
+      return false;
+    }
+
+    return true;
+  });
+}
+
+function matchesSearchText(
+  transaction: PointsTransaction,
+  normalizedSearch: string,
+  isExpiringTab: boolean,
+): boolean {
+  const amountStr = String(transaction.amount);
+
+  if (amountStr.includes(normalizedSearch)) {
+    return true;
+  }
+
+  if (isExpiringTab) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  const description = getTransactionDescription(transaction.type).toLowerCase();
+  if (description.includes(normalizedSearch)) {
+    return true;
+  }
+
+  if (transaction.description?.toLowerCase().includes(normalizedSearch)) {
+    return true;
+  }
+
+  return false;
+}
+
+export function getFilteredTransactionsByText(
+  transactions: PointsTransaction[],
+  searchText: string,
+  isExpiringTab = false,
+): PointsTransaction[] {
+  if (!searchText?.trim() || !transactions?.length) {
+    return transactions;
+  }
+
+  const normalizedSearch = searchText.toLowerCase().trim();
+
+  return transactions.filter(transaction =>
+    matchesSearchText(transaction, normalizedSearch, isExpiringTab));
+}
+
+export function getPlaceholder(): string {
+  return 'Buscar por pontos, tipos de compra etc';
+}
diff --git a/src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/view.tsx b/src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/view.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..056faef6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/view.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,226 @@
+import {
+  Box,
+  CardPoints,
+  Icon,
+  ListCardTransition,
+  SearchUsed,
+  SeparatorHorizontal,
+  Tabs,
+  Text,
+} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';
+import React, { FC } from 'react';
+import { ActivityIndicator, RefreshControl } from 'react-native';
+import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
+import FiltersBottomSheet from '../../atomic/organisms/FiltersBottomSheet';
+import PointsInfoBottomSheet from '../../atomic/organisms/PointsInfoBottomSheet';
+import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
+import { getPlaceholder, useExtractRewardProgramScreen } from './index';
+import type {
+  EmptyListProps,
+  ExtractRewardProgramProps,
+  TransactionsListProps,
+} from './Models';
+
+const EmptyList = React.memo<EmptyListProps>(({ label }) => (
+  <Box width="100%" justify="center" align="center">
+    <Icon
+      name="icon-invoice-error"
+      size="lg"
+      color="INTENSE_COLOR_02"
+      mt="meddium"
+    />
+    <Text
+      type="paragraphLG"
+      pd="innerGreat"
+      color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
+      align="center"
+    >
+      {label}
+    </Text>
+  </Box>
+));
+
+EmptyList.displayName = 'EmptyList';
+
+const TransactionsList = React.memo<TransactionsListProps>(({
+  items,
+  isLoading,
+}) => (
+  <ListCardTransition
+    items={items}
+    isLoading={isLoading}
+    scrollEnabled={false}
+    mb="meddium"
+  />
+));
+
+TransactionsList.displayName = 'TransactionsList';
+
+const LoadingMore = React.memo(() => (
+  <Box width="100%" align="center" justify="center" mt="small" mb="small">
+    <ActivityIndicator size="small" color={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01} />
+  </Box>
+));
+
+LoadingMore.displayName = 'LoadingMore';
+
+const ExtractRewardProgram: FC<ExtractRewardProgramProps> = ({
+  route,
+  navigation,
+}) => {
+  const {
+    hasError,
+    handleGoBack,
+    pointsAvailable,
+    isLoadingExtract,
+    isLoadingMore,
+    isLoadingBalance,
+    isRefreshing,
+    transactionsData,
+    searchText,
+    activeFiltersCount,
+    transactionsEmptyMessage,
+    shouldShowTransactionsList,
+    filterGroups,
+    initialFilters,
+    modalizeRefInfo,
+    modalizeRefFilters,
+    handleSearchChange,
+    handleRefresh,
+    handleError,
+    handleScroll,
+    handleIconInfoPress,
+    handleFilterIconPress,
+    handleApplyFilters,
+    handleTabChange,
+    handleSearchPressIn,
+  } = useExtractRewardProgramScreen({
+    route,
+    navigation,
+  });
+
+  if (hasError) {
+    return (
+      <ApiError
+        title="Algo deu errado!"
+        subTitle="Por favor, tente de novo."
+        isLoading={isLoadingExtract}
+        onPress={handleError}
+      />
+    );
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <>
+      <BasicScreen
+        errorButtonOnPress={handleError}
+        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
+        title="Extrato"
+        hasScroll
+        scrollViewProps={{
+          refreshControl: (
+            <RefreshControl
+              onRefresh={handleRefresh}
+              refreshing={isRefreshing}
+              tintColor={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01}
+            />
+          ),
+          onScroll: handleScroll,
+          scrollEventThrottle: 16,
+        }}
+      >
+        <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" mt="smaller" mb="xxxs">
+          <CardPoints
+            icon="icon-benefits"
+            iconInfo="icon-help"
+            title="Pontos disponíveis"
+            valuePoints={
+              pointsAvailable
+                ? Math.floor(pointsAvailable).toLocaleString('pt-br')
+                : '0'
+            }
+            hideBottom
+            isLoading={isLoadingBalance}
+            onPressIconInfo={handleIconInfoPress}
+          />
+
+          <Text
+            type="paragraphXXXL"
+            mb="xxxxs"
+            mt="xxs"
+            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
+          >
+            Lançamentos
+          </Text>
+
+          <SeparatorHorizontal
+            borderWidth="smaller"
+            borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
+            height={1}
+            mb="xxxxs"
+            width="100%"
+          />
+          <SearchUsed
+            placeholder={getPlaceholder()}
+            onChangeText={handleSearchChange}
+            value={searchText}
+            showIcon={!!activeFiltersCount}
+            firstIcon={undefined}
+            onPressIn={handleSearchPressIn}
+            numberIcon={activeFiltersCount}
+            secondIcon="icon-filter-settings"
+            secondOnPress={handleFilterIconPress}
+            showFilter
+          />
+        </Box>
+
+        <Box
+          ml={isLoadingExtract ? 'xs' : 'none'}
+          mr={isLoadingExtract ? 'xs' : 'none'}
+        >
+          <Tabs
+            items={[
+              {
+                id: 0,
+                title: 'Todos',
+                component: (
+                  <TransactionsList
+                    items={transactionsData}
+                    isLoading={isLoadingExtract}
+                  />
+                ),
+              },
+              {
+                id: 1,
+                title: 'A expirar',
+                component: <></>,
+              },
+            ]}
+            showBackground={false}
+            hasScroll={false}
+            loadingType="light"
+            onChange={handleTabChange}
+            type="options"
+            isLoading={isLoadingExtract}
+          />
+          {!shouldShowTransactionsList && (
+            <EmptyList label={transactionsEmptyMessage} />
+          )}
+          {isLoadingMore && <LoadingMore />}
+        </Box>
+      </BasicScreen>
+      <PointsInfoBottomSheet modalizeRef={modalizeRefInfo} />
+      {filterGroups.length > 0 && (
+        <FiltersBottomSheet
+          modalizeRef={modalizeRefFilters}
+          filterGroups={filterGroups}
+          onApplyFilters={handleApplyFilters}
+          initialFilters={initialFilters}
+        />
+      )}
+    </>
+  );
+};
+
+export default ExtractRewardProgram;

@@ -0,0 +1,169 @@
+import {
+  NavigationProp,
+  useFocusEffect,
+  useNavigation,
+} from '@react-navigation/native';
+import React, { FC, useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
+import { Dimensions } from 'react-native';
+
+import { usePoints } from '../../services';
+
+import { eventScreenViewV3, eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
+import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
+import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
+import { PropsRootStack } from '../../routes/Models';
+import { CashbackInvoiceItem, InvoiceCashbackProps } from './models';
+import InvoiceCashbackView from './view';
+
+const InvoiceCashbackOnboarding: FC<InvoiceCashbackProps> = ({ route }) => {
+  const { width } = Dimensions.get('window');
+
+  const {
+    pointsQuantity,
+    isLoadingBalance,
+    isLoadingParameterization,
+    isErrorBalance,
+    isErrorParameterization,
+    requestParameterization,
+    requestPointsProducts,
+  } = usePoints();
+
+  const [refresh] = useState(0);
+  const hasFocused = useRef(false);
+  useFocusEffect(
+    React.useCallback(() => {
+      if (!hasFocused.current) {
+        eventScreenViewV3(
+          'desconto_fatura_onboarding',
+          'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+          'monetizacao',
+          {
+            location_1: 'monetizacao',
+            location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+            location_3: 'desconto_fatura_onboarding',
+          },
+        );
+        hasFocused.current = true;
+      }
+      return () => {
+        hasFocused.current = false;
+      };
+    }, []),
+  );
+
+  const navigation = useNavigation<NavigationProp<PropsRootStack>>();
+
+  const conversionFactor = route?.params?.conversionFactor ?? 0;
+  const campaingId = route?.params?.campaingId ?? '';
+  const productCode = route?.params?.productCode ?? '';
+
+  const pointsQuantityValue = pointsQuantity || 0;
+
+  const handleGoBack = () => {
+    navigation.goBack();
+  };
+
+  const requestAll = useCallback(() => {
+    requestParameterization();
+    requestPointsProducts();
+  }, [
+    requestParameterization,
+    requestPointsProducts,
+  ]);
+
+  const handleRetry = () => {
+    if (isErrorParameterization) {
+      requestAll();
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleContinue = () => {
+    navigation.navigate('InvoiceCashbackPoints', {
+      conversionFactor: conversionFactor,
+      campaingId: campaingId,
+      productCode: productCode,
+    });
+
+    eventSelectContent({
+      content_type: 'cta',
+      content_id: 'continuar',
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'desconto_fatura_onboarding',
+    });
+  };
+
+  const invoiceList = (): CashbackInvoiceItem[] => {
+    const finalPrice = pointsQuantityValue * conversionFactor;
+    const formattedPrice = new Intl.NumberFormat('pt-BR', {
+      style: 'currency',
+      currency: 'BRL',
+    }).format(finalPrice);
+
+    return [
+      {
+        type: 'default',
+        icon: 'icon-switch-vertical',
+        iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+        iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
+        description: `Cada ${pointsQuantityValue} pontos valem ${formattedPrice} no cashback`,
+      },
+      {
+        type: 'default',
+        icon: 'icon-calendar',
+        iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+        iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
+        description:
+          'Você define quanto cashback quer aplicar na sua fatura aberta',
+      },
+      {
+        type: 'default',
+        icon: 'icon-payment-invoice',
+        iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+        iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
+        description:
+          'Se o valor for maior que o da fatura, a diferença será aplicada nas próximas',
+      },
+      {
+        type: 'default',
+        icon: 'icon-clock',
+        iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+        iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
+        description: 'O cashback acontece em até 72h',
+      },
+    ];
+  };
+
+  const items: CashbackInvoiceItem[] = invoiceList();
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    requestParameterization();
+  }, [refresh]);
+
+  if (isErrorParameterization) {
+    return (
+      <BasicScreen
+        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
+        title="Cashback na fatura"
+        errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry}
+      >
+        <ApiError onPress={handleRetry} />
+      </BasicScreen>
+    );
+  }
+  return (
+    <InvoiceCashbackView
+      handleGoBack={handleGoBack}
+      handleContinue={handleContinue}
+      handleRetry={handleRetry}
+      items={items}
+      hasError={isErrorBalance}
+      hasLoading={isLoadingBalance}
+      cashbackInvoiceList={invoiceList()}
+      width={width}
+      isLoadingParameterization={isLoadingParameterization}
+    />
+  );
+};
+
+export default InvoiceCashbackOnboarding;

+import { NativeStackScreenProps } from '@react-navigation/native-stack';
+import {
+  PropsIconsNameCore,
+  PropsTokenColorsCore,
+} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import { TextIconType } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/molecules/TextIcon/Models';
+import { PropsFintechCardRoutes } from '../../../routes/Models';
+
+export interface InvoiceCashbackViewProps {
+  items: CashbackInvoiceItem[];
+  hasError: boolean;
+  hasLoading: boolean;
+  handleGoBack: () => void;
+  handleContinue: () => void;
+  handleRetry: () => void;
+  cashbackInvoiceList?: CashbackInvoiceItem[];
+  isLoadingParameterization?: boolean;
+  width: number;
+}
+
+export interface InvoiceCashbackProps extends NativeStackScreenProps<
+  PropsFintechCardRoutes,
+  'InvoiceCashbackOnboarding'
+> {}
+
+export interface CashbackInvoiceItem {
+  text?: string;
+  type: TextIconType;
+  icon: PropsIconsNameCore;
+  iconColor: PropsTokenColorsCore;
+  iconColorShape: PropsTokenColorsCore;
+  description: string;
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+import { Box, Button, ListTextIcon, Text } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import React, { FC } from 'react';
+import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
+import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';
+import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
+
+const InvoiceCashbackView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
+  items,
+  hasError,
+  hasLoading,
+  handleGoBack,
+  handleContinue,
+  handleRetry,
+  cashbackInvoiceList,
+  isLoadingParameterization,
+  width,
+}) => {
+  return (
+    <BasicScreen
+      hasScroll
+      hasHeader
+      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
+      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
+      title="Cashback na fatura"
+      hasRightIcon={false}
+      errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry}
+      isLoading={hasLoading}
+      hasError={hasError}
+    >
+      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
+        <Text
+          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
+          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
+          type="headingMDL"
+          mt="smaller"
+        >
+          Use pontos para pagar menos na fatura
+        </Text>
+      </Box>
+      {isLoadingParameterization &&
+        cashbackInvoiceList?.map?.((_, index) => (
+          <Box pd="innerLarge" key={`skeleton-${index}`}>
+            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
+          </Box>
+        ))}
+      {!isLoadingParameterization && (
+        <>
+          <Box ml="nano" mr="nano" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
+            <ListTextIcon
+              items={items}
+              ml="nano"
+              mr="xs"
+              mt="xxs"
+              type="list"
+            />
+          </Box>
+
+          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
+            <Button
+              text="Continuar"
+              mt="large"
+              mb="small"
+              onPress={handleContinue}
+              testID="invoice-cashback-button"
+            />
+          </Box>
+        </>
+      )}
+    </BasicScreen>
+  );
+};
+
+export default InvoiceCashbackView;
diff --git a/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx b/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..a26195ac
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,284 @@
+import {
+  NavigationProp,
+  useFocusEffect,
+  useNavigation,
+} from '@react-navigation/native';
+import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import React, { FC, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
+import { Dimensions } from 'react-native';
+
+import { useScreenViewTracking } from '../../hooks/tracking';
+import { usePoints } from '../../services';
+
+import {
+  eventModalView,
+  eventScreenViewV3,
+  eventSelectContent,
+} from '~/constants/functions';
+import { PropsRootStack } from '../../routes/Models';
+import {
+  formatCurrencyBR,
+  getFormattedPoints,
+  getParsedCurrency,
+  getParsePoints,
+} from '../../utils/functions';
+import { CashbackInvoiceItem, InvoiceCashbackProps } from './models';
+import InvoiceCashbackPointsView from './view';
+
+const InvoiceCashbackPoints: FC<InvoiceCashbackProps> = ({ route }) => {
+  const {
+    points,
+    pointsQuantity,
+    isLoadingParameterization,
+    requestParameterization,
+  } = usePoints();
+  useScreenViewTracking({
+    route,
+    title: 'Cashback na fatura',
+  });
+  const { height, width } = Dimensions.get('window');
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    requestParameterization();
+  }, []);
+
+  const hasFocused = useRef(false);
+  useFocusEffect(
+    React.useCallback(() => {
+      if (!hasFocused.current) {
+        eventScreenViewV3(
+          'desconto_fatura',
+          'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+          'monetizacao',
+          {
+            location_1: 'monetizacao',
+            location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+            location_3: 'desconto_fatura',
+          },
+        );
+        hasFocused.current = true;
+      }
+      return () => {
+        hasFocused.current = false;
+      };
+    }, []),
+  );
+
+  const navigation = useNavigation<NavigationProp<PropsRootStack>>();
+
+  const conversionFactor = route?.params?.conversionFactor ?? 0;
+  const pointsPrice = Number(
+    (Math.trunc(points || 0) * conversionFactor).toFixed(2),
+  );
+
+  const finalPrice = pointsPrice || 0;
+  const [pointsValue, setPointsValue] = useState('');
+  const [reaisValue, setReaisValue] = useState('');
+  const [pointsError, setPointsError] = useState(false);
+  const [reaisError, setReaisError] = useState(false);
+  const convertionPrice = pointsQuantity * conversionFactor;
+  const convertionValue = new Intl.NumberFormat('pt-BR', {
+    style: 'currency',
+    currency: 'BRL',
+  }).format(convertionPrice);
+
+  const handleGoBack = () => {
+    navigation.goBack();
+  };
+
+  const handleContinue = () => {
+    eventSelectContent({
+      content_type: 'cta',
+      content_id: 'continuar',
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'desconto_fatura',
+    });
+
+    const reaisValue = conversionFactor * getParsePoints(pointsValue);
+
+    navigation.navigate('InvoiceCashbackSummary', {
+      pointsSelected: getParsePoints(pointsValue),
+      reaisSelected: reaisValue,
+      conversionFactor,
+      productCode: route?.params?.productCode,
+      campaingId: route?.params?.campaingId,
+    });
+  };
+
+  const invoiceList = (): CashbackInvoiceItem[] => {
+    return [
+      {
+        type: 'default',
+        icon: 'icon-switch-vertical',
+        iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+        iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
+        description: `Cada ${pointsQuantity.toLocaleString(
+          'pt-br',
+        )} pontos valem ${convertionValue} no cashback`,
+      },
+      {
+        type: 'default',
+        icon: 'icon-calendar',
+        iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+        iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
+        description:
+          'Você define quanto cashback quer aplicar na sua fatura aberta',
+      },
+      {
+        type: 'default',
+        icon: 'icon-payment-invoice',
+        iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+        iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
+        description:
+          'Se o valor for maior que o da fatura, a diferença será aplicada nas próximas',
+      },
+      {
+        type: 'default',
+        icon: 'icon-clock',
+        iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+        iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
+        description: 'O cashback acontece em até 72h',
+      },
+    ];
+  };
+  const rate = useMemo(() => {
+    if (conversionFactor && conversionFactor > 0) {
+      return conversionFactor;
+    }
+    return 0;
+  }, [conversionFactor]);
+
+  const items: CashbackInvoiceItem[] = invoiceList();
+
+  const handleChangePoints = (text: string) => {
+    const val = getParsePoints(text);
+    const formatted = val ? getFormattedPoints(val) : '';
+    setPointsValue(formatted);
+
+    if (rate > 0) {
+      setReaisValue(val > 0 ? formatCurrencyBR(val * rate) : '');
+    }
+    if (val > (Math.trunc(Number(points)) || 0)) {
+      setPointsError(true);
+    } else {
+      setPointsError(false);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleChangeReais = (text: string) => {
+    const val = getParsedCurrency(text);
+    const formatted = val > 0 ? formatCurrencyBR(val) : '';
+    setReaisValue(formatted);
+
+    if (rate > 0) {
+      const ptsFromReais = Math.round(val / rate);
+      setPointsValue(ptsFromReais > 0 ? getFormattedPoints(ptsFromReais) : '');
+    }
+    if (val > finalPrice) {
+      setReaisError(true);
+    } else {
+      setReaisError(false);
+    }
+  };
+
+  const handleUseAll = () => {
+    setPointsValue(getFormattedPoints(points || 0));
+    setReaisValue(formatCurrencyBR(finalPrice));
+    setPointsError(false);
+    setReaisError(false);
+  };
+
+  useFocusEffect(
+    React.useCallback(() => {
+      setPointsValue('');
+      setReaisValue('');
+      setPointsError(false);
+      setReaisError(false);
+      return () => {
+        setPointsValue('');
+        setReaisValue('');
+        setPointsError(false);
+        setReaisError(false);
+      };
+    }, [
+      setPointsValue,
+      setReaisValue,
+    ]),
+  );
+
+  const modalizeRef1 = useRef<PropsModalizeRef>(
+    null as unknown as PropsModalizeRef,
+  );
+
+  const onOpenDefault = () => {
+    eventSelectContent({
+      content_type: 'cta',
+      content_id: 'informacoes',
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'desconto_fatura',
+    });
+
+    modalizeRef1.current?.open?.();
+
+    eventModalView({
+      content_id: 'info_desconto_fatura',
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'desconto_fatura',
+    });
+  };
+
+  const handleModalizeContinue = () => {
+    eventSelectContent({
+      content_type: 'cta',
+      content_id: 'entendi',
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'info_desconto_fatura',
+    });
+
+    modalizeRef1.current?.close?.();
+  };
+
+  const handleSelectEvent = (contentId: string) => {
+    eventSelectContent({
+      content_type: 'form',
+      content_id: contentId,
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'desconto_fatura',
+    });
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <InvoiceCashbackPointsView
+      handleGoBack={handleGoBack}
+      points={Math.trunc(Number(points)) || 0}
+      handleContinue={handleContinue}
+      price={pointsPrice}
+      conversionFactor={conversionFactor}
+      formattedPrice={formatCurrencyBR(finalPrice)}
+      handleChangeReais={handleChangeReais}
+      pointsValue={pointsValue}
+      reaisValue={reaisValue}
+      convertionValue={convertionValue}
+      pointsQuantity={pointsQuantity}
+      pointsError={pointsError}
+      reaisError={reaisError}
+      handleChangePoints={handleChangePoints}
+      handleUseAll={handleUseAll}
+      items={items}
+      handleModalizeContinue={handleModalizeContinue}
+      onOpenDefault={onOpenDefault}
+      modalizeRef1={modalizeRef1}
+      handleSelectEvent={handleSelectEvent}
+      height={height}
+      width={width}
+      isLoadingParameterization={isLoadingParameterization}
+    />
+  );
+};
+
+export default InvoiceCashbackPoints;
diff --git a/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/models/index.ts b/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/models/index.ts
