@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+import { NativeStackScreenProps } from '@react-navigation/native-stack';
+import {
+  PropsIconsNameCore,
+  PropsTokenColorsCore,
+} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import { TextIconType } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/molecules/TextIcon/Models';
+import React from 'react';
+import { PropsFintechCardRoutes } from '../../../routes/Models';
+
+export interface InvoiceCashbackViewProps {
+  handleGoBack: () => void;
+  handleContinue: () => void;
+  cashbackInvoiceList?: CashbackInvoiceItem[];
+  points: number;
+  price?: number;
+  conversionFactor?: number;
+  formattedPrice: string;
+  handleChangeReais: (text: string) => void;
+  pointsValue: string;
+  reaisValue: string;
+  convertionValue: string;
+  pointsQuantity: number;
+  pointsError: boolean;
+  reaisError: boolean;
+  handleChangePoints: (text: string) => void;
+  handleUseAll: () => void;
+  items: CashbackInvoiceItem[];
+  isLoadingParameterization?: boolean;
+  handleModalizeContinue: () => void;
+  onOpenDefault: () => void;
+  modalizeRef1: React.RefObject<PropsModalizeRef>;
+  handleSelectEvent: (contentId: string) => void;
+  height: number;
+  width: number;
+}
+
+export interface InvoiceCashbackProps extends NativeStackScreenProps<
+  PropsFintechCardRoutes,
+  'InvoiceCashbackPoints'
+> {}
+
+export interface CashbackInvoiceItem {
+  text?: string;
+  type: TextIconType;
+  icon: PropsIconsNameCore;
+  iconColor: PropsTokenColorsCore;
+  iconColorShape: PropsTokenColorsCore;
+  description: string;
+}
diff --git a/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/view.tsx b/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/view.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..ff491e3b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/view.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,159 @@
+import {
+  BackDropBottom,
+  Box,
+  Button,
+  Icon,
+  InputBox,
+  ListTextIcon,
+  Text,
+} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import React, { FC } from 'react';
+import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
+import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';
+import { formatCurrencyBR, getFormattedPoints } from '../../utils/functions';
+import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
+
+const InvoiceCashbackPointsView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
+  handleGoBack,
+  handleContinue,
+  points,
+  formattedPrice,
+  handleChangeReais,
+  handleChangePoints,
+  handleUseAll,
+  pointsValue,
+  reaisValue,
+  convertionValue,
+  pointsError,
+  reaisError,
+  items,
+  pointsQuantity,
+  handleModalizeContinue,
+  onOpenDefault,
+  modalizeRef1,
+  handleSelectEvent,
+  height,
+  width,
+  isLoadingParameterization,
+}) => {
+  return (
+    <BasicScreen
+      hasScroll
+      hasHeader
+      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
+      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
+      title="Cashback na fatura"
+      hasRightIcon
+      rightIcon="icon-help"
+      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
+      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
+      isLoading={false}
+    >
+      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
+        <Text
+          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
+          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
+          type="headingMDL"
+          mt="smaller"
+        >
+          Defina quanto cashback quer na sua fatura
+        </Text>
+
+        <Box direction mb="smaller" mt="nano" align="center">
+          <Text type="paragraphMD" mr="quark">
+            Pontos disponíveis:
+          </Text>
+          <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mr="quark">
+            {getFormattedPoints(points || 0)}
+          </Text>
+          <Text type="paragraphMD">({formattedPrice})</Text>
+        </Box>
+
+        <InputBox
+          label="Valor em pontos"
+          placeholder="0"
+          showLabel
+          keyboardType="number-pad"
+          value={pointsValue}
+          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_pontos')}
+          onChangeText={handleChangePoints}
+          error={pointsError}
+          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
+          textRight="Usar todos"
+          onPressTextRight={handleUseAll}
+        />
+
+        <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
+          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
+          <Icon
+            name="icon-switch-vertical"
+            size="xxs"
+            color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
+            mr="nano"
+            ml="nano"
+          />
+          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
+        </Box>
+
+        <InputBox
+          label="Valor em reais"
+          placeholder="R$0,00"
+          showLabel
+          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
+          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_valor')}
+          value={reaisValue}
+          onChangeText={handleChangeReais}
+          error={reaisError}
+          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
+        />
+        {isLoadingParameterization && (
+          <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
+            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
+          </Box>
+        )}
+        {!isLoadingParameterization && (
+          <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
+            <Text type="paragraphMD">
+              Cada {pointsQuantity || '0'} pontos valem{' '}
+              {convertionValue || formatCurrencyBR(0)} de cashback na fatura.
+            </Text>
+          </Box>
+        )}
+      </Box>
+      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
+        <Button
+          disabled={
+            pointsValue === '' ||
+            reaisValue === '' ||
+            pointsValue === '0' ||
+            reaisValue === '0' ||
+            pointsError ||
+            reaisError
+          }
+          text="Continuar"
+          mt="large"
+          mb="small"
+          onPress={handleContinue}
+          testID="invoice-cashback-button"
+        />
+      </Box>
+      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
+        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
+          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
+        </Text>
+
+        <ListTextIcon
+          items={items}
+          ml="nano"
+          mr="nano"
+          type="list"
+          mb="smaller"
+        />
+
+        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleModalizeContinue} />
+      </BackDropBottom>
+    </BasicScreen>
+  );
+};
+
+export default InvoiceCashbackPointsView;
diff --git a/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx b/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..67ef2912
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,214 @@
+import {
+  NavigationProp,
+  useFocusEffect,
+  useIsFocused,
+  useNavigation,
+} from '@react-navigation/native';
+import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import React, {
+  FC,
+  useEffect,
+  useLayoutEffect,
+  useMemo,
+  useRef,
+  useState,
+} from 'react';
+import { Dimensions } from 'react-native';
+
+import { useScreenViewTracking } from '../../hooks/tracking';
+import type { RescuePayload } from '../../services';
+import { usePermission, usePoints, useRescue } from '../../services';
+
+import { PropsRootStack } from '../../routes/Models';
+import { CashbackInvoiceItem, InvoiceCashbackProps } from './models';
+import InvoiceCashbackSummaryView from './view';
+
+const InvoiceCashbackSummary: FC<InvoiceCashbackProps> = ({ route }) => {
+  useScreenViewTracking({
+    route,
+    title: 'Cashback na fatura',
+  });
+  const navigation = useNavigation<NavigationProp<PropsRootStack>>();
+  const isFocused = useIsFocused();
+  const { height } = Dimensions.get('window');
+  const { hasRedeemed, markAsRedeemed } = usePermission();
+  const alreadyMarkedRef = useRef(false);
+  const [hasAttemptedRescue, setHasAttemptedRescue] = useState(false);
+
+  const { conversionFactor } = usePoints();
+  const {
+    isLoading: isRescueLoading,
+    isError: isRescueFailed,
+    responseStatus: rescueStatus,
+    rescueRequest,
+    reset: rescueClear,
+  } = useRescue();
+
+  useLayoutEffect(() => {
+    if (isFocused) {
+      setHasAttemptedRescue(false);
+      rescueClear();
+    }
+  }, [
+    isFocused,
+    rescueClear,
+  ]);
+
+  useFocusEffect(
+    React.useCallback(() => {
+      setHasAttemptedRescue(false);
+      rescueClear();
+      return undefined;
+    }, [rescueClear]),
+  );
+
+  const handleGoBack = () => {
+    setHasAttemptedRescue(false);
+    rescueClear();
+    navigation.goBack();
+  };
+
+  const invoiceList = (pts: number): CashbackInvoiceItem[] => {
+    const finalPrice = pts * conversionFactor;
+    const formattedPrice = new Intl.NumberFormat('pt-BR', {
+      style: 'currency',
+      currency: 'BRL',
+    }).format(finalPrice);
+
+    return [
+      {
+        type: 'default',
+        icon: 'icon-switch-vertical',
+        iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+        iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
+        description: `Cada ${pts.toLocaleString(
+          'pt-br',
+        )} pontos valem ${formattedPrice} no cashback`,
+      },
+      {
+        type: 'default',
+        icon: 'icon-calendar',
+        iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+        iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
+        description:
+          'Você define quanto cashback quer aplicar na sua fatura aberta',
+      },
+      {
+        type: 'default',
+        icon: 'icon-payment-invoice',
+        iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+        iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
+        description:
+          'Se o valor for maior que o da fatura, a diferença será aplicada nas próximas',
+      },
+      {
+        type: 'default',
+        icon: 'icon-clock',
+        iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
+        iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
+        description: 'O cashback acontece em até 72h',
+      },
+    ];
+  };
+
+  const pointsSelected = route?.params?.pointsSelected ?? 0;
+  const reaisSelected = route?.params?.reaisSelected ?? 0;
+  const productCode = route?.params?.productCode;
+  const campaingId = route?.params?.campaingId;
+
+  const onConfirmRescue = () => {
+    setHasAttemptedRescue(true);
+    const payload: RescuePayload = {
+      value: pointsSelected,
+      campaignId: campaingId,
+      productCode: productCode,
+      description: 'Cashback resgatado',
+    };
+    rescueRequest(payload);
+  };
+
+  const onExitResult = () => {
+    setHasAttemptedRescue(false);
+    rescueClear();
+    navigation.navigate('RewardProgram');
+  };
+
+  const isRescueConcluded = !isRescueFailed && !!rescueStatus;
+  const showResult =
+    isFocused && hasAttemptedRescue && (isRescueConcluded || isRescueFailed);
+
+  const items: CashbackInvoiceItem[] = invoiceList(pointsSelected);
+
+  const modalizeRef1 = useRef<PropsModalizeRef>(
+    null as unknown as PropsModalizeRef,
+  );
+
+  const onOpenDefault = () => {
+    modalizeRef1.current?.open?.();
+  };
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (
+      showResult &&
+      isRescueConcluded &&
+      !alreadyMarkedRef.current &&
+      hasRedeemed !== true
+    ) {
+      alreadyMarkedRef.current = true;
+      markAsRedeemed().catch(() => {});
+    }
+  }, [
+    showResult,
+    isRescueConcluded,
+    hasRedeemed,
+    markAsRedeemed,
+  ]);
+
+  const nfPtBR = useMemo(() => new Intl.NumberFormat('pt-BR'), []);
+  const getFormatPoints = (n: number) =>
+    nfPtBR.format(Math.max(0, Math.floor(n || 0)));
+  const formatCurrencyBR = (n: number) =>
+    new Intl.NumberFormat('pt-BR', {
+      style: 'currency',
+      currency: 'BRL',
+    })
+      .format(Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0)
+      .replace(/\s/g, '');
+
+  const formattedSelectedPoints = useMemo(
+    () => getFormatPoints(pointsSelected || 0),
+    [pointsSelected],
+  );
+
+  const formattedSelectedReais = useMemo(
+    () => formatCurrencyBR(reaisSelected || 0),
+    [reaisSelected],
+  );
+
+  const effectiveShowResult =
+    typeof showResult !== 'undefined'
+      ? showResult
+      : !!(isRescueConcluded || isRescueFailed);
+  const screenTitle = effectiveShowResult ? 'Conclusão' : 'Cashback na fatura';
+
+  return (
+    <InvoiceCashbackSummaryView
+      handleGoBack={handleGoBack}
+      onConfirmRescue={onConfirmRescue}
+      onExitResult={onExitResult}
+      isRescueLoading={isRescueLoading}
+      isRescueConcluded={isRescueConcluded}
+      isRescueFailed={isRescueFailed}
+      items={items}
+      effectiveShowResult={showResult}
+      onOpenDefault={onOpenDefault}
+      modalizeRef1={modalizeRef1}
+      formattedSelectedPoints={formattedSelectedPoints}
+      formattedSelectedReais={formattedSelectedReais}
+      screenTitle={screenTitle}
+      height={height}
+    />
+  );
+};
+
+export default InvoiceCashbackSummary;

+import { NativeStackScreenProps } from '@react-navigation/native-stack';
+import {
+  PropsIconsNameCore,
+  PropsTokenColorsCore,
+} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import { TextIconType } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/molecules/TextIcon/Models';
+import { PropsFintechCardRoutes } from '../../../routes/Models';
+
+export interface InvoiceCashbackViewProps {
+  handleGoBack: () => void;
+  handleContinue?: () => void;
+  cashbackInvoiceList?: (pts: number, price: number) => CashbackInvoiceItem[];
+  pts?: number;
+  price?: number;
+  pointsQuantity?: number;
+  conversionFactor?: number;
+  pointsSelected?: number;
+  reaisSelected?: number;
+  onConfirmRescue: () => void;
+  onExitResult: () => void;
+  isRescueLoading?: boolean;
+  isRescueConcluded?: boolean;
+  isRescueFailed?: boolean;
+  showResult?: boolean;
+  effectiveShowResult?: boolean;
+  items: CashbackInvoiceItem[];
+  modalizeRef1: React.RefObject<PropsModalizeRef>;
+  onOpenDefault: () => void;
+  formattedSelectedPoints: string;
+  formattedSelectedReais: string;
+  screenTitle?: string;
+  height: number;
+}
+
+export interface InvoiceCashbackProps extends NativeStackScreenProps<
+  PropsFintechCardRoutes,
+  'InvoiceCashbackSummary'
+> {}
+
+export interface CashbackInvoiceItem {
+  text?: string;
+  type: TextIconType;
+  icon: PropsIconsNameCore;
+  iconColor: PropsTokenColorsCore;
+  iconColorShape: PropsTokenColorsCore;
+  description: string;
+}

+  Box,
+  Button,
+  Icon,
+  ListTextIcon,
+  Loading,

+} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import { FC } from 'react';
+
+import React from 'react';
+import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
+import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
+
+const InvoiceCashbackSummaryView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
+  handleGoBack,
+  onConfirmRescue,
+  onExitResult,
+  isRescueLoading,
+  isRescueConcluded,
+  isRescueFailed,
+  items,
+  effectiveShowResult,
+  onOpenDefault,
+  modalizeRef1,

+  formattedSelectedReais,

+      rightIcon="icon-help"
+      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
+      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
+      isLoading={false}
+    >
+      {!effectiveShowResult ? (

+          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">

+            <Text

+              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"

+
+            <Text

+              mt="nano"
+              mb="xxs"

+
+            <SeparatorHorizontal
+              mb="xxs"
+              bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"

+              width="100%"
+            />
+
+            <Text
+              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              type="paragraphMDM"
+              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              mb="nano"
+            >
+              Valor em reais
+            </Text>
+
+            <Text
+              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              type="paragraphL"
+              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              mt="nano"
+              mb="xxs"
+            >
+              {formattedSelectedReais}
+            </Text>
+
+            <SeparatorHorizontal
+              mb="xxs"
+              bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
+              height={1}
+              width="100%"
+            />
+
+            <Text
+              align="left"
+              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              type="paragraphMDM"
+              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              mb="nano"
+            >
+              Cashback em
+            </Text>
+
+            <Text
+              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              type="paragraphL"
+              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              mt="nano"
+              mb="xxs"
+            >
+              Até 72h
+            </Text>
+
+            <Alert
+              label="O valor é aplicado e exibido nos lançamentos da sua fatura aberta."
+              type="highlight"
+              icon="icon-calendar"
+            />
+          </Box>
+
+          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
+            <Button
+              text="Confirmar desconto"
+              mt="large"

+              onPress={onConfirmRescue}

+            <Loading title="Aguarde..." visible={!!isRescueLoading} />

+      ) : (
+        <>

+            <>
+              <Box
+                ml="smaller"

+                flex={1}

+              >
+                <Box
+                  bgColor="PLUS_COLOR_03"
+                  borderColor="PLUS_COLOR_01"
+                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
+                  pd="innerMedium"
+                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
+                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
+                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
+                  borderBottomWidth="small"
+                  borderTopWidth="small"
+                  borderLeftWidth="small"
+                  borderRightWidth="small"
+                  mb="small"
+                >
+                  <Icon name="icon-check" color="PLUS_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
+                </Box>
+
+                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">
+                  Cashback aplicado
+                </Text>
+
+                <Text
+                  align="center"
+                  type="paragraphLG"
+                  color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
+                  mb="small"
+                >
+                  O valor será aplicado em até 72h na sua fatura aberta.
+                </Text>
+              </Box>
+
+              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
+                <Button
+                  text="Ir para o início"
+                  mt="large"
+                  mb="small"
+                  onPress={onExitResult}
+                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-success-button"
+                />
+              </Box>
+            </>
+          )}
+          {!isRescueConcluded && isRescueFailed && (
+            <>
+              <Box
+                ml="smaller"
+                mr="smaller"
+                flex={1}
+                justify="center"
+                align="center"
+              >
+                <Box
+                  bgColor="DENY_COLOR_03"
+                  borderColor="DENY_COLOR_01"
+                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
+                  pd="innerMedium"
+                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
+                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
+                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
+                  borderBottomWidth="small"
+                  borderTopWidth="small"
+                  borderLeftWidth="small"
+                  borderRightWidth="small"
+                  mb="small"
+                >
+                  <Icon
+                    name="icon-circle-alert"
+                    color="DENY_COLOR_01"
+                    size="sm"
+                  />
+                </Box>
+
+                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">
+                  Algo deu errado!
+                </Text>
+
+                <Text type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">
+                  Por favor, tente mais tarde.
+                </Text>
+              </Box>
+
+              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
+                <Button
+                  text="Voltar"
+                  mt="large"
+                  mb="small"
+                  onPress={onExitResult}
+                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-failed-button"
+                />
+              </Box>
+            </>
+          )}
+        </>
+      )}
+
+      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
+        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
+          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
+        </Text>
+
+        <ListTextIcon
+          items={items}
+          ml="nano"
+          mr="nano"
+          type="list"
+          mb="smaller"
+        />
+
+        <Button
+          text="Entendi"
+          onPress={() => {
+            modalizeRef1.current?.close?.();
+          }}
+        />
+      </BackDropBottom>
+    </BasicScreen>
+  );
+};
+
+export default InvoiceCashbackSummaryView;

+export interface LearnMoreRewardProgramViewProps {
+  data: propsItems[];
+  title: string;
+  widthWithPaddingInnerLargerWithMargin: number;
+  onNavigation: () => void;
+}
+
+export interface UseLearnMoreRewardProgramReturn {
+  data: propsItems[];
+  title: string;
+  widthWithPaddingInnerLargerWithMargin: number;
+  onNavigation: () => void;
+  hasError: boolean;
+}
diff --git a/src/screens/LearnMoreRewardProgram/index.tsx b/src/screens/LearnMoreRewardProgram/index.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..7db73f7d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/screens/LearnMoreRewardProgram/index.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,144 @@
+import {
+  useFocusEffect,
+  useNavigation,
+  useRoute,
+} from '@react-navigation/native';
+import { propsItems } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/organisms/Accordion/Models';
+import {
+  MARGIN_STANDING_XS,
+  PADDING_INNER_LARGER,
+} from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/settings/environment';
+import React, { useCallback, useMemo, useRef } from 'react';
+import { useWindowDimensions } from 'react-native';
+import { eventScreenViewV3, eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
+import { useScreenViewTracking } from '../../hooks/tracking';
+import {
+  ParameterPointsProgramStatus,
+  ParameterPointsProgramValue,
+} from '../../services/models';
+import { sanitizeTaxonomy } from '../../utils/functions';
+import type { UseLearnMoreRewardProgramReturn } from './Models';
+import LearnMoreRewardProgramView from './view';
+
+function useLearnMoreRewardProgram(): UseLearnMoreRewardProgramReturn {
+  const route = useRoute();
+  const navigation = useNavigation();
+  const hasFocused = useRef(false);
+  const { width } = useWindowDimensions();
+  const { status, selectedCategory } = useRootStore(
+    state => state.parameterPointsProgram,
+  );
+
+  useScreenViewTracking({
+    route,
+    title: 'Saiba mais',
+  });
+
+  useFocusEffect(
+    useCallback(() => {
+      if (!hasFocused.current) {
+        eventScreenViewV3(
+          'saiba_mais',
+          'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+          'monetizacao',
+          {
+            location_1: 'monetizacao',
+            location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+            location_3: 'saiba_mais',
+          },
+        );
+        hasFocused.current = true;
+      }
+      return () => {
+        hasFocused.current = false;
+      };
+    }, []),
+  );
+
+  const widthWithPaddingInnerLarger = Math.ceil(width - PADDING_INNER_LARGER);
+  const widthWithPaddingInnerLargerWithMargin =
+    widthWithPaddingInnerLarger - MARGIN_STANDING_XS;
+
+  const handleNavigation = () => {
+    navigation.goBack();
+  };
+
+  const items = useMemo((): propsItems[] => {
+    if (
+      typeof selectedCategory?.value === 'string' ||
+      !selectedCategory?.value?.questions ||
+      !selectedCategory?.category
+    ) {
+      return [];
+    }
+
+    return selectedCategory.value.questions.map((
+      item: {
+        question: string;
+        answer: string;
+      },
+      index: number,
+    ): propsItems => {
+      return {
+        id: index,
+        title: item.question,
+        text: item.answer,
+        titleColor: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01',
+        headerIconName: (selectedCategory.value as ParameterPointsProgramValue)
+          .icon,
+        hasSecondaryParagraph: false,
+        hideSecondaryIconParagraph: true,
+        hideIcon: true,
+        onPressCard: () => {
+          eventSelectContent({
+            content_type: 'cta',
+            content_id: sanitizeTaxonomy(item.question),
+            location_1: 'monetizacao',
+            location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+            location_3: 'saiba_mais',
+          });
+        },
+      } as propsItems;
+    });
+  }, [selectedCategory]);
+
+  const hasError =
+    !selectedCategory ||
+    typeof selectedCategory?.value === 'string' ||
+    status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR;
+
+  return {
+    data: items,
+    title: selectedCategory?.category || '',
+    widthWithPaddingInnerLargerWithMargin,
+    onNavigation: handleNavigation,
+    hasError,
+  };
+}
+
+export default function LearnMoreRewardProgram() {
+  const {
+    data,
+    title,
+    widthWithPaddingInnerLargerWithMargin,
+    onNavigation,
+    hasError,
+  } = useLearnMoreRewardProgram();
+
+  if (hasError) {
+    return <ApiError onPress={onNavigation} />;
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <LearnMoreRewardProgramView
+      data={data}
+      title={title}
+      widthWithPaddingInnerLargerWithMargin={
+        widthWithPaddingInnerLargerWithMargin
+      }
+      onNavigation={onNavigation}
+    />
+  );
+}

+import { Box, BoxSafeArea } from '@semparar/design-system-app';

+import {
+  NavigationProp,
+  useFocusEffect,
+  useNavigation,
+} from '@react-navigation/native';
+import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import { format, parseISO } from 'date-fns';
+import React, { useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
+import { Dimensions } from 'react-native';
+import { PropsRootStack } from 'src/routes/Models';
+import { useShallow } from 'zustand/react/shallow';
+import { eventScreenViewV3, eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import { PointsExtractStatus } from '../../services/models';
+import { getPointsExtract } from '../../services/services';
+import { FilterGroup } from '../ExtractRewardProgram/Models';
+import MyOrdersCashbackView from './view';
+
+const MyOrdersCashback = () => {
+  const [isRefreshing, setIsRefreshing] = useState(false);
+
+  const modalizeRefFilters = useRef<PropsModalizeRef>(null);
+  const emptyImage =
+    'https://image.mkt-semparar.com.br/lib/fe2f117170640475721171/m/1/shopping_cart.png';
+
+  const SKELETON_COUNT = 3;
+  const { width } = Dimensions.get('window');
+
+  const { pointsExtract, pointsExtractActions } = useRootStore(
+    useShallow(state => ({
+      pointsExtract: state.pointsExtract,
+      pointsExtractActions: state.pointsExtractActions,
+    })),
+  );
+
+  const getFormatDate = (iso?: string) => {
+    if (!iso) return '';
+    const date = parseISO(iso);
+    return format(date, 'dd/MM/yyyy');
+  };
+
+  const getFilterGroups: FilterGroup[] = useMemo(() => {
+    return [
+      {
+        label: 'Períodos',
+        options: [
+          {
+            label: '7 dias',
+            value: 0,
+          },
+          {
+            label: '15 dias',
+            value: 1,
+          },
+          {
+            label: '30 dias',
+            value: 2,
+          },
+          {
+            label: '60 dias',
+            value: 3,
+          },
+          {
+            label: '90 dias',
+            value: 4,
+          },
+        ],
+      },
+      {
+        label: 'Tipos de lançamentos',
+        options: [
+          {
+            label: 'Mais recentes',
+            value: 'ASC',
+          },
+          {
+            label: 'Mais antigas',
+            value: 'DESC',
+          },
+        ],
+      },
+    ];
+  }, []);
+
+  const handleOpenFilters = () => {
+    eventSelectContent({
+      content_type: 'cta',
+      content_id: 'filtro_pedidos',
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'meus_pedidos',
+    });
+
+    modalizeRefFilters.current?.open?.();
+  };
+
+  const handleDetailsOrders = () => {
+    eventSelectContent({
+      content_type: 'cta',
+      content_id: 'detalhe_pedido',
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'meus_pedidos',
+    });
+  };
+
+  const myOrders = pointsExtract?.extractData?.transactions || [];
+
+  const isLoading = pointsExtract.status === PointsExtractStatus.LOADING;
+  const isError = pointsExtract.status === PointsExtractStatus.ERROR;
+
+  const navigation = useNavigation<NavigationProp<PropsRootStack>>();
+
+  const handleGoBack = () => {
+    pointsExtractActions.clearTransactionsFilters();
+    pointsExtractActions.reset();
+    navigation.goBack();
+  };
+
+  const handleRefresh = async () => {
+    setIsRefreshing(true);
+    await getPointsExtract({ type: 'Resgate' });
+    setIsRefreshing(false);
+  };
+
+  const hasFocused = useRef(false);
+  useFocusEffect(
+    React.useCallback(() => {
+      if (!hasFocused.current) {
+        eventScreenViewV3(
+          'meus_pedidos',
+          'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+          'monetizacao',
+          {
+            location_1: 'monetizacao',
+            location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+            location_3: 'meus_pedidos',
+          },
+        );
+        pointsExtractActions.clearTransactionsFilters();
+        pointsExtractActions.reset();
+        getPointsExtract({ type: 'Resgate' });
+        hasFocused.current = true;
+      }
+      return () => {
+        hasFocused.current = false;
+      };
+    }, []),
+  );
+
+  return (
+    <MyOrdersCashbackView
+      myOrders={myOrders}
+      emptyImage={emptyImage}
+      isLoading={isLoading}
+      isError={isError}
+      filterGroups={getFilterGroups}
+      modalizeRefFilters={modalizeRefFilters}
+      formatDate={getFormatDate}
+      handleGoBack={handleGoBack}
+      handleOpenFilters={handleOpenFilters}
+      handleDetailsOrders={handleDetailsOrders}
+      isRefreshing={isRefreshing}
+      handleRefresh={handleRefresh}
+      skeletonCount={SKELETON_COUNT}
+      screenWidth={width}
+    />
+  );
+};
+
+export default MyOrdersCashback;

+import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import { TypesTagLabel } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/molecules/TagLabel/Models';
+import { PointsTransaction } from '../../../services/models';
+
+export const STATUS_COLORS: Record<string, TypesTagLabel> = {
+  Pendente: 'highlight',
+  Confirmado: 'highlight',
+  Enviado: 'success',
+  Finalizado: 'success',
+  Estornado: 'error',
+  Cancelado: 'alert',
+};
+
+export interface MyOrdersItemPropsView {
+  myOrders: PointsTransaction[];
+  emptyImage: string;
+  isLoading: boolean;
+  isError: boolean;
+  modalizeRefFilters: React.RefObject<PropsModalizeRef | null>;
+  filterGroups: {
+    label: string;
+    options: {
+      label: string;
+      value: number | string;
+    }[];
+  }[];
+  isRefreshing: boolean;
+  skeletonCount: number;
+  screenWidth: number;
+  formatDate: (iso?: string) => string;
+  handleGoBack: () => void;
+  handleOpenFilters: () => void;
+  handleDetailsOrders: () => void;
+  handleRefresh: () => void;
+}

+import {
+  Box,
+  CardVehicleTags,
+  Image,
+  PropsIconsNameCore,
+  Skeleton,
+  Text,
+} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';
+import React, { FC, RefObject } from 'react';
+import { FlatList, RefreshControl } from 'react-native';
+import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
+import FiltersBottomSheet from '../../atomic/organisms/FiltersBottomSheet';
+import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
+import { MyOrdersItemPropsView, STATUS_COLORS } from './models';
+
+const MyOrdersCashbackView: FC<MyOrdersItemPropsView> = ({
+  handleGoBack,
+  myOrders,
+  emptyImage,
+  formatDate,
+  isLoading,
+  isError,
+  modalizeRefFilters,
+  handleOpenFilters,
+  handleDetailsOrders,
+  handleRefresh,
+  filterGroups,
+  isRefreshing,
+  skeletonCount,
+  screenWidth,
+}) => {
+  return (
+    <BasicScreen
+      title="Meus pedidos"
+      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
+      hasScroll
+      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
+      rightIcon="icon-filter-settings"
+      rightIconOnPress={handleOpenFilters}
+      hasRightIcon={!!myOrders.length}
+      scrollViewProps={{
+        refreshControl: (
+          <RefreshControl
+            onRefresh={handleRefresh}
+            refreshing={isRefreshing}
+            tintColor={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01}
+          />
+        ),
+      }}
+    >
+      {isLoading && (
+        <Box width={screenWidth} mt="nano">
+          <FlatList
+            testID="loading-list-cashback"
+            data={Array.from({ length: skeletonCount })}
+            keyExtractor={(_, index) => index.toString()}
+            scrollEnabled={false}
+            renderItem={() => (
+              <Skeleton
+                testID="loading-orders-cashback"
+                width={screenWidth - 64}
+                height={150}
+                type="light"
+                mt="nano"
+                mb="nano"
+                mr="medium"
+                ml="medium"
+                borderRadiusTopLeft="half"
+              />
+            )}
+          />
+        </Box>
+      )}
+
+      {isError && (
+        <ApiError
+          testID="orders-cashback-error"
+          title="Algo deu errado!"
+          subTitle="Por favor, tente mais tarde"
+          isLoading={isLoading}
+          hasBackToHome={false}
+          onPress={handleGoBack}
+        />
+      )}
+
+      {!isLoading && !isError && (
+        <FlatList
+          data={myOrders}
+          renderItem={({ item }) => (
+            <Box ml="middle" mr="middle" mt="smaller">
+              <CardVehicleTags
+                vehicleName={item.description}
+                icon={item.icon as PropsIconsNameCore}
+                title="Valor em pontos"
+                titleDescription={String(Math.abs(item.amount))}
+                date="Data do resgate"
+                dateNumber={formatDate(item.date)}
+                statusTitle="Status do pedido"
+                status={item.status}
+                ghostButtonText="Exibir detalhes"
+                onGhostButtonPress={handleDetailsOrders}
+                type="extended"
+                typeTag={STATUS_COLORS[item.status] ?? 'alert'}
+                version="2.0"
+              />
+            </Box>
+          )}
+          ListEmptyComponent={() => (
+            <Box align="center" pd="innerLarger" justify="center" mt="larger">
+              <Image
+                resizeMode="contain"
+                /* @ts-ignore `source` is not in the props Of `image` ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°) */
+                source={{ uri: emptyImage }}
+                width={80}
+                height={80}
+              />
+
+              <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mt="nano">
+                Nenhum pedido feito
+              </Text>
+              <Text type="paragraphLG" align="center" mt="nano">
+                Quando você usar seus pontos em pedidos, eles aparecerão aqui.
+              </Text>
+            </Box>
+          )}
+        />
+      )}
+      {filterGroups.length > 0 && (
+        <FiltersBottomSheet
+          modalizeRef={modalizeRefFilters as RefObject<PropsModalizeRef>}
+          filterGroups={filterGroups}
+          onApplyFilters={() => {}}
+          initialFilters={{}}
+        />
+      )}
+    </BasicScreen>
+  );
+};
+
+export default MyOrdersCashbackView;

+import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import { RefObject } from 'react';
+import { PropsFintechCardRoutes } from '../../../routes/Models';
+import { PointsProduct } from '../../../services/models';
+
+export interface PointsProps extends NativeStackScreenProps<
+  PropsFintechCardRoutes,
+  'RewardProgram'
+> {}
+
+export type OnPressHandler = () => void;
+
+export interface PointsCardItem {
+  id: number;
+  text: string;
+  bgColor: string;
+  icon: string;
+  textAlign: string;
+  iconColor: string;
+  onPress: () => void;
+}
+
+export interface PointsViewProps {
+  isLoadingBalance: boolean;
+  handleGoBack: () => void;
+  pointsAvailable?: number;
+  pointsOptions?: PointsProduct[];
+  items?: PointsCardItem[];
+  pointsHasError?: boolean;
+  handleNavigateToInvoiceCashback?: () => void;
+  onOpenExtract: () => void;
+  onOpenDefault: () => void;
+  modalizeRef: RefObject<PropsModalizeRef>;
+  onMenuPress: () => void;
+  isMyOrders: boolean;
+  setIsMyOrders: (value: boolean) => void;
+  handlerGoHome: () => void;
+  handleMyOrders: () => void;
+}

+export const KEY_NAME_TO_ICON = {
+  RESCUE_IN_INVOICE: 'resgate de cashback em fatura',
+  MARKETPLACE: 'marketplace',
+  FUEL_VOUCHER: 'voucher para abastecimento',
+  MONTHLY_DISCOUNT: 'desconto na mensalidade',
+  CAR_INSURANCE_DISCOUNT: 'desconto seguro auto',
+  PARKING_DISCOUNT: 'desconto em estacionamento',
+  FINES_DISCOUNT: 'desconto em multas e debitos',
+  IPVA_DISCOUNT: 'desconto ipva',
+  AIRLINE_MILES: 'milhas aereas',
+};
+
+export const NAME_TO_ICON: Record<string, string> = {
+  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.RESCUE_IN_INVOICE]: 'icon-discount',
+  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MARKETPLACE]: 'icon-shopping-bag',
+  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FUEL_VOUCHER]: 'icon-supply',
+  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MONTHLY_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-debit-account',
+  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.CAR_INSURANCE_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-protect-car',
+  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.PARKING_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-toll-gate',
+  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FINES_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-attach',
+  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.IPVA_DISCOUNT]: 'icon-vehicle',
+  [KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.AIRLINE_MILES]: 'icon-airplane',
+};
+
+const NAME_TO_KEY: Record<string, string> = {
+  'resgate de cashback em fatura': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.RESCUE_IN_INVOICE,
+  marketplace: KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MARKETPLACE,
+  'voucher para abastecimento': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FUEL_VOUCHER,
+  'desconto na mensalidade': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.MONTHLY_DISCOUNT,
+  'desconto seguro auto': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.CAR_INSURANCE_DISCOUNT,
+  'desconto em estacionamento': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.PARKING_DISCOUNT,
+  'desconto em multas e debitos': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.FINES_DISCOUNT,
+  'desconto ipva': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.IPVA_DISCOUNT,
+  'milhas aereas': KEY_NAME_TO_ICON.AIRLINE_MILES,
+};
+
+export const getNormalizedKeyName = (name: string): string => {
+  switch (NAME_TO_KEY[name]) {
+    case 'resgate de cashback em fatura':
+      return 'cashback na fatura';
+    case 'marketplace':
+      return 'marketplace';
+    case 'voucher para abastecimento':
+      return 'voucher para abastecimento';
+    case 'desconto na mensalidade':
+      return 'desconto na mensalidade';
+    case 'desconto seguro auto':
+      return 'desconto seguro auto';
+    case 'desconto em estacionamento':
+      return 'desconto em estacionamento';
+    case 'desconto em multas e débitos':
+      return 'desconto em multas e debitos';
+    case 'desconto IPVA':
+      return 'desconto ipva';
+    case 'milhas aereas':
+      return 'milhas aereas';
+    default:
+      return '';
+  }
+};
diff --git a/src/screens/Points/index.tsx b/src/screens/Points/index.tsx
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..7b55490d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/screens/Points/index.tsx
@@ -0,0 +1,196 @@
+import { useFocusEffect } from '@react-navigation/native';
+import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import React, {
+  FC,
+  useCallback,
+  useEffect,
+  useMemo,
+  useRef,
+  useState,
+} from 'react';
+import {
+  eventModalView,
+  eventScreenViewV3,
+  eventSelectContent,
+} from '~/constants/functions';
+import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
+import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
+import { useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints } from '../../hooks/custom/useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints';
+import { getParameterPointsProgram, usePoints } from '../../services';
+import { PointsProps } from './Models';
+import PointsView from './view';
+
+const Points: FC<PointsProps> = ({ navigation }) => {
+  const {
+    points,
+    products,
+    isLoadingBalance,
+    isErrorBalance,
+    isErrorProducts,
+    requestInitialData,
+    requestPointsBalance,
+    requestPointsProducts,
+    clear,
+  } = usePoints();
+  const hasFocused = useRef(false);
+  const modalizeRef = useRef<PropsModalizeRef>(
+    null as unknown as PropsModalizeRef,
+  );
+  const [isMyOrders, setIsMyOrders] = useState(false);
+
+  const handleMyOrders = () => {
+    navigation.navigate('MyOrdersRewardProgram');
+  };
+
+  const handleGoBack = () => {
+    navigation.goBack();
+  };
+  const handlerGoHome = () => {
+    navigation.navigate('Home' as never);
+  };
+
+  const handleOpenDefault = () => {
+    eventSelectContent({
+      content_type: 'cta',
+      content_id: 'informacao_pontos',
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'home_hub_recompensas',
+    });
+
+    modalizeRef.current?.open?.();
+  };
+
+  const handleOpenMyOrders = () => {
+    setIsMyOrders(true);
+
+    eventModalView({
+      content_id: 'menu_header',
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'home_hub_recompensas',
+    });
+  };
+
+  const buildPointsCardItems = useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints();
+
+  const requestPointsCallback = useCallback(() => {
+    requestPointsBalance();
+    requestPointsProducts();
+    getParameterPointsProgram();
+  }, [
+    requestPointsBalance,
+    requestPointsProducts,
+  ]);
+
+  const handleApiErrorPress = () => {
+    if (isErrorBalance || isErrorProducts) {
+      requestPointsCallback();
+    }
+  };
+
+  useFocusEffect(
+    useCallback(() => {
+      if (!hasFocused.current) {
+        eventScreenViewV3(
+          'home_hub_recompensas',
+          'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+          'monetizacao',
+          {
+            location_1: 'monetizacao',
+            location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+            location_3: 'home_hub_recompensas',
+          },
+        );
+        hasFocused.current = true;
+      }
+      return () => {
+        hasFocused.current = false;
+      };
+    }, []),
+  );
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    requestInitialData();
+
+    return () => {
+      clear();
+    };
+  }, []);
+
+  useFocusEffect(
+    useCallback(() => {
+      requestPointsCallback();
+      return undefined;
+    }, [requestPointsCallback]),
+  );
+
+  const view = useMemo(() => {
+    if (isErrorProducts || isErrorBalance) {
+      return (
+        <BasicScreen
+          leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
+          title="Programa de Pontos"
+          errorButtonOnPress={handleApiErrorPress}
+        >
+          <ApiError onPress={handleApiErrorPress} />
+        </BasicScreen>
+      );
+    }
+
+    const normalizedItems = buildPointsCardItems(products);
+
+    const onOpenExtract = () => {
+      eventSelectContent({
+        content_type: 'cta',
+        content_id: 'exibir_extrato',
+        location_1: 'monetizacao',
+        location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+        location_3: 'home_hub_recompensas',
+      });
+      navigation.navigate('ExtractRewardProgram', {
+        analytics: {
+          screen_name: 'extrato_hub_recompensas',
+          screen_class: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+          screen_bussines: 'monetizacao',
+          screen_info: {
+            location_1: 'monetizacao',
+            location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+            location_3: 'extrato_hub_recompensas',
+          },
+        },
+      });
+    };
+
+    return (
+      <PointsView
+        items={normalizedItems}
+        isLoadingBalance={isLoadingBalance}
+        handleGoBack={handleGoBack}
+        pointsAvailable={points}
+        pointsOptions={products}
+        onOpenExtract={onOpenExtract}
+        onOpenDefault={handleOpenDefault}
+        modalizeRef={modalizeRef}
+        isMyOrders={isMyOrders}
+        setIsMyOrders={setIsMyOrders}
+        handlerGoHome={handlerGoHome}
+        onMenuPress={handleOpenMyOrders}
+        handleMyOrders={handleMyOrders}
+      />
+    );
+  }, [
+    points,
+    products,
+    isLoadingBalance,
+    isErrorBalance,
+    isErrorProducts,
+    navigation,
+    buildPointsCardItems,
+    isMyOrders,
+  ]);
+
+  return view;
+};
+
+export default Points;

@@ -0,0 +1,91 @@
+import {
+  Box,
+  CardActivity,
+  CardMiddle,
+  CardPoints,
+  Text,
+} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import React, { FC } from 'react';
+
+import { PropsCardMiddle } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/molecules/Cards/CardMiddle/Models';
+import LearnMorePointsSection from '../../atomic/organisms/LearnMorePointsSection';
+import PointsInfoBottomSheet from '../../atomic/organisms/PointsInfoBottomSheet';
+import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
+import { formatPoints } from '../../utils/formatPoints';
+import { PointsViewProps } from './Models';
+
+const PointsView: FC<PointsViewProps> = ({
+  isLoadingBalance,
+  handleGoBack,
+  pointsAvailable,
+  items,
+  onOpenExtract,
+  onOpenDefault,
+  modalizeRef,
+  isMyOrders,
+  setIsMyOrders,
+  onMenuPress,
+  handleMyOrders,
+}) => {
+  return (
+    <>
+      <BasicScreen
+        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
+        hasScroll
+        leftIconOnPress={() => {
+          isMyOrders ? setIsMyOrders(false) : handleGoBack();
+        }}
+        rightIcon="icon-menu"
+        rightIconOnPress={onMenuPress}
+        hasRightIcon={!isMyOrders}
+        title={isMyOrders ? 'Meu espaço' : 'Programa de Pontos'}
+      >
+        {isMyOrders ? (
+          <CardActivity
+            isLoading={isLoadingBalance}
+            icon="icon-shopping-bag"
+            showIcon
+            showIconRight={false}
+            hideBackground
+            hideBorder
+            title="Meus pedidos"
+            titleTextType="paragraphXL"
+            onPress={handleMyOrders}
+          />
+        ) : (
+          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
+            <CardPoints
+              icon="icon-benefits"
+              iconInfo="icon-help"
+              iconAction="icon-next"
+              isLoading={isLoadingBalance}
+              mt="smaller"
+              mb="xs"
+              onPressIconInfo={onOpenDefault}
+              onPressExtract={() => onOpenExtract()}
+              textExtract="Extrato completo"
+              title="Pontos disponíveis"
+              valuePoints={formatPoints(pointsAvailable ?? 0)}
+            />
+
+            <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mb="xxxs">
+              Onde usar meus pontos
+            </Text>
+
+            <CardMiddle
+              items={items as PropsCardMiddle['items']}
+              renderType="grid"
+              isLoading={isLoadingBalance}
+              mb="xs"
+            />
+
+            <LearnMorePointsSection />
+          </Box>
+        )}
+      </BasicScreen>
+      <PointsInfoBottomSheet modalizeRef={modalizeRef} />
+    </>
+  );
+};
+
+export default PointsView;

+} from '../../../services/models';

+import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import React, { FC, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
+
+import { useFocusEffect } from '@react-navigation/native';
+import {
+  eventModalView,
+  eventScreenViewV3,
+  eventSelectContent,
+} from '~/constants/functions';
+import { ScreenProps } from '../../routes/Models';
+import PointsDetailView from './view';
+
+const PointsDetail: FC<ScreenProps<'PointsDetail'>> = ({
+  navigation,
+  route,
+}) => {
+  const hasFocused = useRef(false);
+  const modalizeRef = useRef<PropsModalizeRef>(null);
+
+  useFocusEffect(
+    useCallback(() => {
+      if (!hasFocused.current) {
+        eventScreenViewV3(
+          'detalhe_extrato_hub_recompensas',
+          'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+          'monetizacao',
+          {
+            location_1: 'monetizacao',
+            location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+            location_3: 'detalhe_extrato_hub_recompensas',
+          },
+        );
+        hasFocused.current = true;
+      }
+      return () => {
+        hasFocused.current = false;
+      };
+    }, []),
+  );
+
+  const handleGoBack = () => {
+    navigation.goBack();
+  };
+
+  const handleOpenReportProblem = () => {
+    eventSelectContent({
+      content_type: 'cta',
+      content_id: 'relatar_problema',
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'detalhe_extrato_hub_recompensas',
+    });
+
+    eventModalView({
+      content_id: 'contato_telefones',
+      location_1: 'monetizacao',
+      location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+      location_3: 'detalhe_extrato_hub_recompensas',
+    });
+
+    modalizeRef.current?.open?.();
+  };
+
+  const handleCloseReportProblem = () => {
+    modalizeRef.current?.close?.();
+  };
+
+  const transaction = route.params?.transaction;
+
+  if (!transaction) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <PointsDetailView
+      handleGoBack={handleGoBack}
+      transaction={transaction}
+      modalizeRef={modalizeRef}
+      handleOpenReportProblem={handleOpenReportProblem}
+      handleCloseReportProblem={handleCloseReportProblem}
+    />
+  );
+};
+
+export default PointsDetail;
diff --git a/src/screens/PointsDetail/utils.ts b/src/screens/PointsDetail/utils.ts
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..dc01e11e
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/screens/PointsDetail/utils.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,182 @@
+import { PointsTransaction, TransactionType } from './Models';
+
+type TransactionGainType = 'CARD' | 'TAG' | 'CASHBACK';
+type TagSubType =
+  | 'DRIVE_THRU'
+  | 'PEDAGIO'
+  | 'ESTACIONAMENTO'
+  | 'ABASTECIMENTO'
+  | 'LAVA_RAPIDO';
+
+interface TransactionDetailField {
+  label?: string;
+  value?: string;
+}
+
+export const getTransactionGainType = (
+  transaction: PointsTransaction,
+): TransactionGainType => {
+  const provider = transaction.details?.provider?.toLowerCase() || '';
+
+  if (provider.includes('cashback')) {
+    return 'CASHBACK';
+  }
+
+  const icon = transaction.icon?.toLowerCase() || '';
+  const description = transaction.description?.toLowerCase() || '';
+
+  const tagIndicators = [
+    'tag',
+    'pedágio',
+    'pedagio',
+    'estacionamento',
+    'abastecimento',
+    'abastece',
+    'drive',
+    'lava',
+    'rápido',
+  ];
+
+  const isTag = tagIndicators.some(
+    indicator =>
+      icon.includes(indicator) ||
+      description.includes(indicator) ||
+      provider.includes(indicator),
+  );
+
+  return isTag ? 'TAG' : 'CARD';
+};
+
+export const getTagSubType = (
+  transaction: PointsTransaction,
+): TagSubType | null => {
+  const description = transaction.description?.toUpperCase() || '';
+  const provider = transaction.details?.provider?.toUpperCase() || '';
+  const extraInfo = transaction.details?.extraInfo?.toUpperCase() || '';
+  const searchText = `${description} ${provider} ${extraInfo}`;
+
+  if (
+    searchText.includes('DRIVE') ||
+    searchText.includes('DRIVE-THRU') ||
+    searchText.includes('DRIVE THRU')
+  ) {
+    return 'DRIVE_THRU';
+  }
+  if (searchText.includes('PEDÁGIO') || searchText.includes('PEDAGIO')) {
+    return 'PEDAGIO';
+  }
+  if (searchText.includes('ESTACIONAMENTO')) {
+    return 'ESTACIONAMENTO';
+  }
+  if (searchText.includes('ABASTECIMENTO') || searchText.includes('ABASTECE')) {
+    return 'ABASTECIMENTO';
+  }
+  if (searchText.includes('LAVA') && searchText.includes('RÁPIDO')) {
+    return 'LAVA_RAPIDO';
+  }
+
+  return null;
+};
+
+export const getDetailScreenTitle = (
+  gainType: TransactionGainType,
+  transactionType?: TransactionType,
+): string => {
+  if (gainType === 'CASHBACK' && transactionType === 'RESCUE') {
+    return 'Detalhes de uso';
+  }
+  if (gainType === 'CASHBACK') {
+    return 'Detalhes do Cashback';
+  }
+  return gainType === 'CARD' ? 'Detalhes da compra' : 'Detalhes da pontuação';
+};
+
+export const getVehicleInfo = (
+  transaction: PointsTransaction,
+): string | null => {
+  const fields: TransactionDetailField[] = transaction.details?.fields || [];
+
+  const marcaField = fields.find((f: TransactionDetailField) =>
+    f.label?.toLowerCase().includes('marca'));
+  const modeloField = fields.find((f: TransactionDetailField) =>
+    f.label?.toLowerCase().includes('modelo'));
+  const placaField = fields.find((f: TransactionDetailField) =>
+    f.label?.toLowerCase().includes('placa'));
+
+  const marca = marcaField?.value || '';
+  const modelo = modeloField?.value || '';
+  const placa = placaField?.value || '';
+
+  if (marca && modelo && placa) {
+    return `${marca} ${modelo} - ${placa}`;
+  }
+
+  if (placa) {
+    return placa;
+  }
+
+  const origemField = fields.find(
+    (f: TransactionDetailField) =>
+      f.label?.toLowerCase().includes('origem') ||
+      f.label?.toLowerCase().includes('origin'),
+  );
+
+  if (origemField?.value) {
+    return origemField.value;
+  }
+
+  return null;
+};
+
+export const getPurchaseTypeLabel = (tagSubType: TagSubType | null): string => {
+  if (!tagSubType) return '';
+
+  const labels: Record<TagSubType, string> = {
+    DRIVE_THRU: 'Drive Thru',
+    PEDAGIO: 'Pedágio',
+    ESTACIONAMENTO: 'Estacionamento',
+    ABASTECIMENTO: 'Abastecimento',
+    LAVA_RAPIDO: 'Lava Rápido',
+  };
+
+  return labels[tagSubType] || '';
+};
+
+export const getOrigin = (transaction: PointsTransaction): string | null => {
+  const fields: TransactionDetailField[] = transaction.details?.fields || [];
+
+  const origemField = fields.find(
+    (f: TransactionDetailField) =>
+      f.label?.toLowerCase().includes('origem') ||
+      f.label?.toLowerCase().includes('origin'),
+  );
+
+  return origemField?.value || null;
+};
+
+export const getFormattedPointsValue = (
+  amount: number,
+  type: TransactionType,
+): string => {
+  const prefix = type === 'CREDIT' || type === 'REFUNDED' ? '+ ' : '- ';
+  const label = Math.abs(amount) === 1 ? 'ponto' : 'pontos';
+  return `${prefix}${Math.abs(amount).toLocaleString('pt-BR')} ${label}`;
+};
+
+export const getFormattedHighlightText = (
+  date: string,
+  gainType: TransactionGainType,
+  moment: any,
+): string => {
+  const transactionDate = moment(date);
+  const day = transactionDate.format('DD');
+  const month = transactionDate.format('MMM').toLowerCase();
+  const year = transactionDate.format('YYYY');
+  const time = transactionDate.format('HH:mm');
+
+  if (gainType === 'CASHBACK') {
+    return `Pontos usados em ${day} ${month} ${year} às ${time}`;
+  }
+
+  return `Compra feita em ${day} ${month} ${year} às ${time}`;
+};

+import {
+  BackDropBottom,
+  Box,
+  Button,
+  CardActivity,
+  DetailTransactionValue,
+  SeparatorHorizontal,
+  TagLabel,
+  Text,
+} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
+import React, { FC } from 'react';
+import { Linking } from 'react-native';
+import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
+import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
+import { moment } from '../../services/moment';
+import { formatToCurrency } from '../../utils/functions';
+import { PointsDetailProps } from './Models';
+import {
+  getDetailScreenTitle,
+  getFormattedHighlightText,
+  getFormattedPointsValue,
+  getOrigin,
+  getPurchaseTypeLabel,
+  getTagSubType,
+  getTransactionGainType,
+  getVehicleInfo,
+} from './utils';
+
+const PointsDetailView: FC<PointsDetailProps> = ({
+  handleGoBack,
+  transaction,
+  modalizeRef,
+  handleOpenReportProblem,
+  handleCloseReportProblem,
+}) => {
+  const gainType = getTransactionGainType(transaction);
+  const tagSubType = getTagSubType(transaction);
+  const screenTitle = getDetailScreenTitle(gainType, transaction.type);
+  const vehicleInfo = getVehicleInfo(transaction);
+  const purchaseTypeLabel = getPurchaseTypeLabel(tagSubType);
+  const origin = getOrigin(transaction);
+  const formattedCurrencyValue = formatToCurrency(transaction.currencyValue);
+  const formattedPointsValue = getFormattedPointsValue(
+    transaction.amount,
+    transaction.type,
+  );
+  const cardTitle = transaction.description || '';
+  const highlightText = getFormattedHighlightText(
+    transaction.date,
+    gainType,
+    moment,
+  );
+
+  const renderDivider = () => {
+    return (
+      <SeparatorHorizontal
+        borderWidth="smaller"
+        borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
+        height={1}
+        width="100%"
+        mt="xxxxs"
+      />
+    );
+  };
+
+  const renderTagContent = () => {
+    const hasVehicleInfo = !!vehicleInfo && vehicleInfo !== '';
+    const shouldShowOrigin = origin && !hasVehicleInfo;
+    const hasPurchaseTypeLabel =
+      !!purchaseTypeLabel && purchaseTypeLabel !== '';
+
+    return (
+      <>
+        {renderDivider()}
+        {shouldShowOrigin && (
+          <>
+            <Text
+              type="paragraphXL"
+              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              mb="xxxxs"
+              mt="xxxxs"
+            >
+              Origem
+            </Text>
+            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
+              {origin}
+            </Text>
+            {renderDivider()}
+          </>
+        )}
+        {hasVehicleInfo && (
+          <>
+            <Text
+              type="paragraphXL"
+              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              mb="xxxxs"
+              mt="xxxxs"
+            >
+              Tag
+            </Text>
+            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
+              {vehicleInfo}
+            </Text>
+            {renderDivider()}
+          </>
+        )}
+
+        {hasPurchaseTypeLabel && (
+          <>
+            <Text
+              type="paragraphXL"
+              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              mb="xxxxs"
+              mt="xxxxs"
+            >
+              Tipo de compra
+            </Text>
+            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
+              {purchaseTypeLabel}
+            </Text>
+          </>
+        )}
+      </>
+    );
+  };
+
+  return (
+    <>
+      <BasicScreen
+        title={screenTitle}
+        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
+        hasScroll
+        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
+      >
+        <DetailTransactionValue
+          icon={transaction.icon as never}
+          title={cardTitle}
+          titleColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+          iconBgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
+          points={formattedPointsValue}
+          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
+          pointsColor={
+            transaction.type === 'CREDIT' || transaction.type === 'REFUNDED'
+              ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02'
+              : ('INTENSE_COLOR_05' as const)
+          }
+        />
+
+        <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" mt="xxxxs" flex={1}>
+          <TagLabel
+            icon={undefined}
+            type="neutral"
+            text={highlightText}
+            showSpacing
+          />
+
+          <Box mt="xxxs" flex={1} width="100%">
+            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs">
+              Valor
+            </Text>
+            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
+              {formattedCurrencyValue}
+            </Text>
+
+            {gainType === 'TAG' && renderTagContent()}
+          </Box>
+
+          <Box width="100%" align="flex-end" mb="small">
+            <Button
+              type="secundaryLarge"
+              text="Relatar Problema"
+              onPress={handleOpenReportProblem}
+            />
+          </Box>
+        </Box>
+      </BasicScreen>
+
+      <BackDropBottom modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}>
+        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxs">
+          <Box align="center" width="100%">
+            <Text
+              type="paragraphXXXL"
+              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
+              mb="xs"
+              align="center"
+            >
+              Central de Atendimento
+            </Text>
+          </Box>
+        </Box>
+
+        <Box pd="innerSmall">
+          <CardActivity
+            mt="nano"
+            icon="icon-contact"
+            title="Capitais"
+            description="4002 1552"
+            iconRight="icon-next"
+            showIcon
+            showTagLabel={false}
+            onPress={() => {
+              eventSelectContent({
+                content_type: 'cta',
+                content_id: 'telefones_capitais',
+                location_1: 'monetizacao',
+                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
+              });
+              Linking.openURL('tel:40021552');
+            }}
+          />
+
+          <CardActivity
+            mt="nano"
+            icon="icon-contact"
+            title="Demais localidades"
+            description="0800 015 0252"
+            iconRight="icon-next"
+            showIcon
+            showTagLabel={false}
+            onPress={() => {
+              eventSelectContent({
+                content_type: 'cta',
+                content_id: 'telefones_demais_localidades',
+                location_1: 'monetizacao',
+                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
+              });
+
+              Linking.openURL('tel:08000150252');
+            }}
+          />
+          <Text type="paragraphXS" color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt="xxxxs">
+            *Atendimento de segunda à sexta das 9h às 21h. Sábado e domingo das
+            9h às 17h.
+          </Text>
+        </Box>
+
+        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxxxs">
+          <Text
+            type="linkMD"
+            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
+            onPress={handleCloseReportProblem}
+            align="center"
+          >
+            Fechar
+          </Text>
+        </Box>
+      </BackDropBottom>
+    </>
+  );
+};
+
+export default PointsDetailView;

+import { useFocusEffect } from '@react-navigation/native';
+import React, { useCallback, useRef, useState } from 'react';
+import { WebViewProps } from 'react-native-webview';
+import AnimationArrows from '../../atomic/atoms/AnimationArrows';
+import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
+import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
+import { useScreenViewTracking } from '../../hooks/tracking';
+import { useMarketplace } from '../../services';
+import { PARAMS_GET_MARKETPLACE } from './data';
+import { RewardProgramMarketplaceWebProps } from './Models';
+import View from './view';
+
+const RewardProgramMarketplaceWebView = ({
+  navigation,
+  route,
+}: RewardProgramMarketplaceWebProps) => {
+  useScreenViewTracking({
+    route,
+    title: 'Shopping',
+  });
+
+  const { data, isLoading, isError, requestGetMarketplace } = useMarketplace();
+
+  const [isLocalError, setIsLocalError] = useState(false);
+  const webViewRef = useRef<WebViewProps>(null);
+
+  const requestGetMarketplaceCallback = useCallback(() => {
+    requestGetMarketplace(PARAMS_GET_MARKETPLACE);
+  }, [requestGetMarketplace]);
+
+  useFocusEffect(requestGetMarketplaceCallback);
+
+  const handleGoBack = () => {
+    navigation.goBack();
+  };
+
+  const handleError = () => {
+    setIsLocalError(true);
+  };
+
+  if (isLoading) {
+    return <AnimationArrows />;
+  }
+
+  if (isError || !data || isLocalError) {
+    return (
+      <BasicScreen
+        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
+        title="Shopping"
+        errorButtonOnPress={requestGetMarketplaceCallback}
+      >
+        <ApiError onPress={requestGetMarketplaceCallback} />
+      </BasicScreen>
+    );
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <View
+      webViewRef={webViewRef}
+      uri={data.dados.redirectURL}
+      onBackPress={handleGoBack}
+      errorButtonOnPress={handleError}
+      onError={handleError}
+    />
+  );
+};
+
+export default RewardProgramMarketplaceWebView;

+import { Box, Loading } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import React from 'react';
+import { Platform, useWindowDimensions } from 'react-native';
+import { WebView } from 'react-native-webview';
+import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
+import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
+import { RewardProgramMarketplaceWebViewProps } from './Models';
+
+const RewardProgramMarketplaceWebViewView = ({
+  uri,
+  webViewRef,
+  onError,
+  onBackPress,
+  errorButtonOnPress,
+}: RewardProgramMarketplaceWebViewProps) => {
+  const { width, height } = useWindowDimensions();
+
+  return (
+    <BasicScreen
+      leftIconOnPress={onBackPress}
+      rightIcon="icon-close"
+      hasScroll={false}
+      title="Shopping"
+      errorButtonOnPress={errorButtonOnPress}
+      scrollViewProps={{
+        nestedScrollEnabled: true,
+      }}
+    >
+      <Box index={1001} width="100%" flex={1}>
+        <WebView
+          ref={webViewRef as React.RefObject<WebView>}
+          source={{ uri }}
+          style={{
+            width,
+            height,
+          }}
+          startInLoadingState
+          onError={onError}
+          mixedContentMode="compatibility"
+          allowsInlineMediaPlayback
+          mediaPlaybackRequiresUserAction={false}
+          domStorageEnabled
+          javaScriptEnabled
+          thirdPartyCookiesEnabled
+          sharedCookiesEnabled
+          allowsBackForwardNavigationGestures
+          bounces={false}
+          scrollEnabled={true}
+          nestedScrollEnabled={Platform.OS === 'android'}
+          originWhitelist={['*']}
+          scalesPageToFit={Platform.OS === 'android'}
+          renderLoading={() => <Loading title="Carregando..." visible />}
+          renderError={() => (
+            <Box
+              justify="center"
+              align="center"
+              width="100%"
+              height="100%"
+              pd="innerGreat"
+            >
+              <ApiError onPress={errorButtonOnPress} />
+            </Box>
+          )}
+        />
+      </Box>
+    </BasicScreen>
+  );
+};
+
+export default RewardProgramMarketplaceWebViewView;

--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/services/api/extract.api.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+import { api } from '@semparar/mf-app-user';
+import type { AxiosResponse } from 'axios';
+import { EXTRACT_CONSTANTS } from '../constants';
+
+export type ExtractRequestType = 'Credito' | 'Debito' | 'Expirado' | 'Resgate';
+
+export interface ExtractRequestDto {
+  participantId: string;
+  page?: number;
+  pageSize?: number;
+  type?: ExtractRequestType;
+}
+
+export interface TransactionDto {
+  id: string;
+  date: string;
+  description: string;
+  type: string;
+  amount: number;
+  icon: string;
+  status?: string;
+  origination?: string;
+}
+
+interface PaginationDto {
+  page: number;
+  pageSize: number;
+  total: number;
+  totalPages: number;
+}
+
+export interface PointsExtractApiResponse {
+  data: {
+    transactions: TransactionDto[];
+  };
+  pagination: PaginationDto;
+  status: {
+    returnCode: number;
+    message: string;
+  };
+}
+
+interface PointsBalanceApiResponse {
+  data: { points?: number };
+  status: {
+    returnCode?: number;
+    codigoRetorno?: number;
+    message?: string;
+  };
+}
+
+function buildExtractRequestPayload(
+  payload: ExtractRequestDto,
+): ExtractRequestDto {
+  return {
+    participantId: payload.participantId,
+    page: payload.page ?? EXTRACT_CONSTANTS.DEFAULT_PAGE,
+    pageSize: payload.pageSize ?? EXTRACT_CONSTANTS.DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE,
+    ...(payload.type ? { type: payload.type } : {}),
+  };
+}
+
+export async function getPointsExtractApi(
+  payload: ExtractRequestDto,
+): Promise<AxiosResponse<PointsExtractApiResponse>> {
+  const requestPayload = buildExtractRequestPayload(payload);
+
+  return api.post<PointsExtractApiResponse>(
+    'fintech/v1/rewardProgram/extract',
+    requestPayload,
+  );
+}
+
+export async function getPointsBalanceApi(): Promise<
+  AxiosResponse<PointsBalanceApiResponse>
+> {
+  return api.get<PointsBalanceApiResponse>(
+    'fintech/v1/rewardProgram/balance',
+    {},
+  );
+}

new file mode 100644
index 00000000..1221e1b4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/services/hooks/useAirlineMiles.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+import { useCallback } from 'react';
+import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import { AIRLINE_MILES_PARAMS } from '../models';
+import { airlineMilesService } from '../services';
+
+export const useAirlineMiles = () => {
+  const airlineMiles = useRootStore(useShallow(state => state.airlineMiles));
+
+  const fetchAirlineMilesToken = useCallback(async (): Promise<boolean> => {
+    const { airlineMilesActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+
+    try {
+      airlineMilesActions.setLoading(true);
+
+      const response = await airlineMilesService.getToken(AIRLINE_MILES_PARAMS);
+
+      if (response.status.codigoRetorno === 0) {
+        airlineMilesActions.setRedirectURL(response.dados.redirectURL);
+        return true;
+      } else {
+        airlineMilesActions.setError(
+          response.status.mensagem || 'Failed to get token',
+        );
+        return false;
+      }
+    } catch (error) {
+      airlineMilesActions.setError('Failed to load airline miles marketplace');
+      return false;
+    }
+  }, []);
+
+  const reset = useCallback(() => {
+    useRootStore.getState().airlineMilesActions.reset();
+  }, []);
+
+  return {
+    ...airlineMiles,
+    fetchAirlineMilesToken,
+    reset,
+  };
+};

+import { useCallback } from 'react';
+import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import { MarketplaceStatus } from '../models';
+import { clearMarketplace, getMarketplace } from '../services';
+
+export function useMarketplace() {
+  const marketplace = useRootStore(useShallow(state => state.marketplace));
+
+  const requestGetMarketplace = useCallback(async (
+    params: Record<string, string>,
+  ) => {
+    await getMarketplace(params);
+  }, []);
+
+  const clear = useCallback(() => {
+    clearMarketplace();
+  }, []);
+
+  return {
+    data: marketplace.data,
+    isLoading: marketplace.status === MarketplaceStatus.LOADING,
+    isError: marketplace.status === MarketplaceStatus.ERROR,
+    requestGetMarketplace,
+    clear,
+  };
+}

new file mode 100644
index 00000000..2ef3b826
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/services/hooks/usePermission.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,55 @@
+import { useCallback } from 'react';
+import { useSelector } from 'react-redux';
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import { PermissionStatus } from '../models';
+import {
+  checkHasRedeemed as checkHasRedeemedService,
+  markAsRedeemed as markAsRedeemedService,
+} from '../services';
+
+export function usePermission() {
+  const accountId = useSelector((state: any) => state?.customerReducer?.nrc);
+
+  const { hasRedeemed, status } = useRootStore(
+    state => state.rewardsPermission,
+  );
+
+  const isLoading = status === PermissionStatus.LOADING;
+  const isError = status === PermissionStatus.ERROR;
+
+  const checkHasRedeemed = useCallback(
+    async ({
+      forceRefresh = false,
+    }: { forceRefresh?: boolean } = {}): Promise<boolean> => {
+      if (hasRedeemed !== null && !forceRefresh) {
+        return hasRedeemed;
+      }
+
+      if (!accountId) {
+        throw new Error('Expected accountId to be defined.');
+      }
+
+      return checkHasRedeemedService(accountId);
+    },
+    [
+      accountId,
+      hasRedeemed,
+    ],
+  );
+
+  const markAsRedeemed = useCallback(async (): Promise<boolean> => {
+    if (!accountId) {
+      return false;
+    }
+
+    return markAsRedeemedService(accountId);
+  }, [accountId]);
+
+  return {
+    hasRedeemed,
+    isLoading,
+    isError,
+    checkHasRedeemed,
+    markAsRedeemed,
+  };
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,68 @@
+import { useCallback } from 'react';
+import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import {
+  ParameterPointsProgramStatus,
+  PointsBalanceStatus,
+  PointsProductsStatus,
+} from '../models';
+import {
+  getParameterPointsProgram,
+  getPointsBalance,
+  getPointsProducts,
+} from '../services';
+
+export function usePoints() {
+  const pointsProducts = useRootStore(
+    useShallow(state => state.pointsProducts),
+  );
+  const pointsBalance = useRootStore(useShallow(state => state.pointsBalance));
+  const parameterPointsProgram = useRootStore(
+    useShallow(state => state.parameterPointsProgram),
+  );
+
+  const requestInitialData = useCallback(async () => {
+    await Promise.all([
+      getPointsBalance(),
+      getPointsProducts(),
+      getParameterPointsProgram(),
+    ]);
+  }, []);
+
+  const requestPointsBalance = useCallback(async () => {
+    await getPointsBalance();
+  }, []);
+
+  const requestPointsProducts = useCallback(async () => {
+    await getPointsProducts();
+  }, []);
+
+  const requestParameterization = useCallback(async () => {
+    await getParameterPointsProgram();
+  }, []);
+
+  const clear = useCallback(() => {
+    const { pointsProductsActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+    pointsProductsActions.reset();
+  }, []);
+
+  return {
+    points: pointsBalance.points,
+    isLoadingBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.LOADING,
+    isErrorBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.ERROR,
+    products: pointsProducts.products,
+    isLoadingProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.LOADING,
+    isErrorProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.ERROR,
+    pointsQuantity: parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity,
+    conversionFactor: parameterPointsProgram.conversionFactor,
+    isLoadingParameterization:
+      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING,
+    isErrorParameterization:
+      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR,
+    requestPointsBalance,
+    requestPointsProducts,
+    requestParameterization,
+    requestInitialData,
+    clear,
+  };
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+import { useCallback } from 'react';
+import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import type { RescueCallbacks, RescuePayload } from '../models';
+import { RescueStatus } from '../models';
+import { clearRescue, performRescue } from '../services';
+
+export function useRescue() {
+  const rescue = useRootStore(useShallow(state => state.rescue));
+
+  const rescueRequest = useCallback(async (
+    payload: RescuePayload,
+    callbacks?: RescueCallbacks,
+  ) => {
+    await performRescue(payload, callbacks);
+  }, []);
+
+  const reset = useCallback(() => {
+    clearRescue();
+  }, []);
+
+  return {
+    ...rescue,
+    isLoading: rescue.status === RescueStatus.LOADING,
+    isError: rescue.status === RescueStatus.ERROR,
+    isSuccess: rescue.status === RescueStatus.SUCCESS,
+    rescueRequest,
+    reset,
+  };
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,99 @@
+import type { propsItemsListCardTransition } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/organisms/ListCardTransition/Models';
+
+export enum PointsExtractStatus {
+  IDLE = 'idle',
+  LOADING = 'loading',
+  SUCCESS = 'success',
+  ERROR = 'error',
+}
+
+export enum PointsBalanceStatus {
+  IDLE = 'idle',
+  LOADING = 'loading',
+  SUCCESS = 'success',
+  ERROR = 'error',
+}
+
+export type TransactionType = 'CREDIT' | 'RESCUE' | 'EXPIRED' | 'REFUNDED';
+
+export const TYPE_LABELS: Record<TransactionType, string> = {
+  CREDIT: 'Ganhos',
+  RESCUE: 'Usados',
+  EXPIRED: 'Expirados',
+  REFUNDED: 'Reembolsados',
+};
+
+export const PERIOD_DAYS_MAP: Record<number, number> = {
+  0: 7,
+  1: 15,
+  2: 30,
+  3: 60,
+  4: 90,
+};
+
+export interface PointsTransaction {
+  id: string;
+  date: string;
+  description: string;
+  type: TransactionType;
+  amount: number;
+  currencyValue: number;
+  icon: string;
+  details: {
+    provider: string;
+    extraInfo: string;
+    fields: Array<{
+      label: string;
+      value: string;
+    }>;
+  };
+  status: string;
+}
+
+export interface PaginationDto {
+  page: number;
+  pageSize: number;
+  total: number;
+  totalPages: number;
+}
+
+export interface PointsExtractData {
+  transactions: PointsTransaction[];
+  pagination: PaginationDto;
+}
+
+export interface ProcessedExtractData {
+  groupedTransactions: Array<{
+    date: string;
+    items: propsItemsListCardTransition[];
+  }>;
+  mappedTransactions: propsItemsListCardTransition[];
+}
+
+export interface AppliedFilters {
+  period?: number;
+  types?: string[];
+}
+
+export interface PointsExtractState {
+  extractData?: PointsExtractData;
+  processedExtractData?: ProcessedExtractData;
+  status: PointsExtractStatus;
+  isLoadingMore: boolean;
+  error?: string;
+}
+
+export interface PointsBalanceState {
+  points?: number;
+  status: PointsBalanceStatus;
+  error?: string;
+}
+
+export interface ExpiringFilters {
+  period?: number;
+}
+
+export interface PointsExtractFiltersState {
+  appliedTransactionsFilters?: AppliedFilters;
+  appliedExpiringFilters?: ExpiringFilters;
+}
