diff --git a/src/services/repository/extract.repository.ts b/src/services/repository/extract.repository.ts
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..5a5752ea
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/services/repository/extract.repository.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,252 @@
+import { PropsIconsNameCore } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import { PropsCardTransition } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/molecules/CardTransition/Models';
+import { propsItemsListCardTransition } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/organisms/ListCardTransition/Models';
+import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
+import type { getPointsExtractApi, TransactionDto } from '../api/extract.api';
+import type {
+  PointsExtractData,
+  PointsTransaction,
+  ProcessedExtractData,
+  TransactionType,
+} from '../models/extract.model';
+import { TYPE_LABELS } from '../models/extract.model';
+import { moment } from '../moment';
+
+const TRANSACTION_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, TransactionType> = {
+  CREDIT: 'CREDIT',
+  RESCUE: 'RESCUE',
+  EXPIRED: 'EXPIRED',
+  REFUNDED: 'REFUNDED',
+};
+
+const DEFAULT_PROCESSED_EXTRACT_DATA: ProcessedExtractData = {
+  groupedTransactions: [],
+  mappedTransactions: [],
+};
+
+function getMappedTransactionType(backendType: string): TransactionType {
+  return TRANSACTION_TYPE_MAP[backendType] ?? 'CREDIT';
+}
+
+function getFormattedDateForHeader(dateString: string): string {
+  return moment(dateString).format('DD [de] MMMM').toLowerCase();
+}
+
+function getFormattedPointsValue(
+  amount: number,
+  type: TransactionType,
+): string {
+  const isPositive = type === 'CREDIT' || type === 'REFUNDED';
+  const prefix = isPositive ? '+ ' : '- ';
+  return `${prefix}${Math.abs(amount).toLocaleString('pt-BR')} pontos`;
+}
+
+function getTransactionDescription(type: TransactionType): string {
+  return TYPE_LABELS[type] || '';
+}
+
+function getCapitalizedText(text: string): string {
+  if (!text) return text;
+  return text.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + text.slice(1).toLowerCase();
+}
+
+function getTransactionCardItem(
+  transaction: PointsTransaction,
+): PropsCardTransition {
+  const isPositive =
+    transaction.type === 'CREDIT' || transaction.type === 'REFUNDED';
+  const valueColor = isPositive ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02' : 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01';
+  const isExpired = transaction.type === 'EXPIRED';
+
+  return {
+    type: 'default' as const,
+    bgColor: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01' as const,
+    titleColor: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01' as const,
+    isSelected: true,
+    leftIcon: isExpired
+      ? 'icon-less'
+      : (transaction.icon as PropsIconsNameCore),
+    leftIconColor: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01',
+    labelBgColor: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03',
+    showBackgroundLeftIcon: true,
+    title: getCapitalizedText(transaction.description),
+    description: undefined,
+    value: getFormattedPointsValue(transaction.amount, transaction.type),
+    valueColor,
+    descriptionSecondary: getTransactionDescription(transaction.type),
+    descriptionSecondaryColor: 'INTENSE_COLOR_04',
+    showIcon: true,
+    rightIcon: 'icon-next',
+    showRightIcon: !isExpired,
+    onPressDetail: () => {
+      eventSelectContent({
+        content_type: 'cta',
+        content_id: 'detalhe_ponto',
+        location_1: 'monetizacao',
+        location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
+        location_3: 'extrato_hub_recompensas',
+      });
+    },
+  };
+}
+
+interface GroupedTransactions {
+  date: string;
+  items: propsItemsListCardTransition[];
+}
+
+function getGroupedTransactionsByDate(
+  transactions: PointsTransaction[],
+): GroupedTransactions[] {
+  if (transactions.length === 0) {
+    return [];
+  }
+
+  const sortedTransactions = [...transactions].sort((a, b) =>
+    moment(b.date).diff(moment(a.date)));
+
+  const groupedByDate = sortedTransactions.reduce(
+    (acc, transaction) => {
+      const formattedDate = getFormattedDateForHeader(transaction.date);
+
+      if (!acc[formattedDate]) {
+        acc[formattedDate] = [];
+      }
+
+      acc[formattedDate].push(
+        getTransactionCardItem(transaction) as propsItemsListCardTransition,
+      );
+      return acc;
+    },
+    {} as Record<string, propsItemsListCardTransition[]>,
+  );
+
+  const getSortedItemsByDate = (
+    items: propsItemsListCardTransition[],
+    date: string,
+  ) => {
+    return items.sort((a, b) => {
+      const transactionA = sortedTransactions.find(
+        t =>
+          getFormattedDateForHeader(t.date) === date &&
+          getTransactionCardItem(t).title === a.title,
+      );
+      const transactionB = sortedTransactions.find(
+        t =>
+          getFormattedDateForHeader(t.date) === date &&
+          getTransactionCardItem(t).title === b.title,
+      );
+
+      if (transactionA && transactionB) {
+        return moment(transactionB.date).diff(moment(transactionA.date));
+      }
+      return 0;
+    });
+  };
+
+  const getSortedByDate = (a: GroupedTransactions, b: GroupedTransactions) => {
+    const dateA = moment(a.date.split(' ').slice(1).join(' '), 'DD MMMM');
+    const dateB = moment(b.date.split(' ').slice(1).join(' '), 'DD MMMM');
+    return dateB.diff(dateA);
+  };
+
+  return Object.entries(groupedByDate)
+    .map(([date, items]) => ({
+      date,
+      items: getSortedItemsByDate(
+        items as propsItemsListCardTransition[],
+        date,
+      ),
+    }))
+    .sort(getSortedByDate);
+}
+
+class PointsDataGroupedByDayMapper {
+  public static getMappedData(
+    groupedData: Array<{
+      date: string;
+      items: propsItemsListCardTransition[];
+    }>,
+    showLabels = true,
+  ): propsItemsListCardTransition[] {
+    if (!groupedData || groupedData.length === 0) return [];
+
+    return groupedData.flatMap(({ date: label, items }) =>
+      (items ?? []).map((item, index) => ({
+        ...item,
+        label,
+        showLabel: showLabels ? index === 0 : false,
+      }))) as propsItemsListCardTransition[];
+  }
+}
+
+function getTransactionFromDto(dto: TransactionDto): PointsTransaction {
+  return {
+    id: dto.id,
+    date: dto.date,
+    description: dto.description,
+    type: getMappedTransactionType(dto.type),
+    amount: dto.amount,
+    currencyValue: 0,
+    icon: dto.icon,
+    details: {
+      provider: '',
+      extraInfo: '',
+      fields: [],
+    },
+    status: dto.status ?? '',
+  };
+}
+
+export function processPointsExtractData(
+  extractData: PointsExtractData | null | undefined,
+): ProcessedExtractData {
+  if (!extractData || typeof extractData !== 'object') {
+    return DEFAULT_PROCESSED_EXTRACT_DATA;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    const transactions = extractData.transactions || [];
+    const groupedTransactions = getGroupedTransactionsByDate(transactions);
+    const mappedTransactions =
+      PointsDataGroupedByDayMapper.getMappedData(groupedTransactions);
+
+    return {
+      groupedTransactions,
+      mappedTransactions,
+    };
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.warn('Erro ao processar dados do extrato:', error);
+    return DEFAULT_PROCESSED_EXTRACT_DATA;
+  }
+}
+
+export function getPointsExtractFromResponse(
+  response: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getPointsExtractApi>>,
+): PointsExtractData | null {
+  const apiResponse = response?.data;
+
+  if (!apiResponse) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  const transactionsContainer = apiResponse.data ?? apiResponse;
+  const transactionsDto = transactionsContainer?.transactions;
+  const pagination =
+    apiResponse.pagination ?? (apiResponse as any).data?.pagination;
+
+  if (!transactionsDto || !Array.isArray(transactionsDto)) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  if (!pagination) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  const transactions = transactionsDto.map(getTransactionFromDto);
+
+  return {
+    transactions,
+    pagination,
+  };
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,61 @@
+import { PropsIconsNameCore } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
+import type {
+  ParameterPointsProgramResponse,
+  ParameterPointsProgramValue,
+} from '../models';
+
+interface CategoryItem {
+  category: string;
+  questions?: Array<{
+    question: string;
+    answer: string;
+  }>;
+  icon?: string;
+  order?: number;
+}
+
+interface ParsedData {
+  categories: CategoryItem[];
+}
+
+export function mapParameterPointsProgramResponse(
+  response: ParameterPointsProgramResponse[],
+): ParameterPointsProgramResponse[] {
+  try {
+    const find = response.find(
+      item => item.category.toLowerCase() === 'saiba mais',
+    );
+
+    if (!find || typeof find.value !== 'string') {
+      return [];
+    }
+
+    const data = JSON.parse(find.value) as ParsedData;
+
+    if (!data?.categories || !Array.isArray(data.categories)) {
+      return [];
+    }
+
+    return data.categories.map((
+      item,
+      index,
+    ): ParameterPointsProgramResponse => {
+      const value: ParameterPointsProgramValue = {
+        questions: item.questions ?? [],
+        order: item.order ?? index,
+        icon: (item.icon as PropsIconsNameCore) ?? 'icon-help',
+      };
+
+      return {
+        category: item.category,
+        value,
+        dateCreated: find.dateCreated,
+        status: find.status,
+        PK: find.PK,
+        dateUpdated: find.dateUpdated,
+      };
+    });
+  } catch {
+    return [];
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/services/services/extract.service.ts b/src/services/services/extract.service.ts
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..cd99ab87
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/services/services/extract.service.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,160 @@
+import { eventServerResponse } from '~/constants/functions';
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import {
+  getPointsBalanceApi,
+  getPointsExtractApi,
+  type ExtractRequestDto,
+} from '../api';
+import { ANALYTICS_EVENTS, EXTRACT_CONSTANTS } from '../constants';
+import {
+  PointsBalanceStatus,
+  PointsExtractStatus,
+  type PointsExtractData,
+} from '../models';
+import {
+  getPointsExtractFromResponse,
+  processPointsExtractData,
+} from '../repository';
+import { getParticipantIdFromToken } from '../utils';
+
+interface GetPointsExtractPayload {
+  page?: number;
+  type?: ExtractRequestDto['type'];
+  participantId?: string;
+}
+
+function shouldFetchExtract(
+  status: PointsExtractStatus,
+  isFirstPage: boolean,
+): boolean {
+  if (isFirstPage) {
+    return (
+      status !== PointsExtractStatus.LOADING &&
+      status !== PointsExtractStatus.SUCCESS
+    );
+  }
+  return true;
+}
+
+function handleExtractSuccess(
+  extractData: PointsExtractData,
+  processedData: ReturnType<typeof processPointsExtractData>,
+  isFirstPage: boolean,
+): void {
+  const { pointsExtractActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+
+  if (isFirstPage) {
+    pointsExtractActions.setExtractData(extractData, processedData);
+  } else {
+    pointsExtractActions.appendExtractData(extractData, processedData);
+  }
+
+  eventServerResponse(ANALYTICS_EVENTS.EXTRACT_SUCCESS);
+}
+
+function handleExtractError(isFirstPage: boolean): void {
+  const { pointsExtractActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+
+  if (isFirstPage) {
+    pointsExtractActions.setExtractStatus(PointsExtractStatus.ERROR);
+  } else {
+    pointsExtractActions.setLoadingMore(false);
+  }
+
+  eventServerResponse(ANALYTICS_EVENTS.EXTRACT_ERROR);
+}
+
+export async function getPointsExtract(
+  payload?: GetPointsExtractPayload,
+): Promise<void> {
+  const { pointsExtractActions, pointsExtract } = useRootStore.getState();
+
+  const page = payload?.page ?? EXTRACT_CONSTANTS.DEFAULT_PAGE;
+  const isFirstPage = page === EXTRACT_CONSTANTS.DEFAULT_PAGE;
+
+  if (!shouldFetchExtract(pointsExtract.status, isFirstPage)) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (isFirstPage) {
+    pointsExtractActions.setExtractStatus(PointsExtractStatus.LOADING);
+  } else {
+    pointsExtractActions.setLoadingMore(true);
+  }
+
+  try {
+    const participantId =
+      payload?.participantId ?? (await getParticipantIdFromToken());
+
+    if (!participantId) {
+      handleExtractError(isFirstPage);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const requestPayload: ExtractRequestDto = {
+      participantId,
+      page,
+      pageSize: EXTRACT_CONSTANTS.DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE,
+      ...(payload?.type ? { type: payload.type } : {}),
+    };
+
+    const response = await getPointsExtractApi(requestPayload);
+    const extractData = getPointsExtractFromResponse(response);
+
+    if (extractData) {
+      const processedData = processPointsExtractData(extractData);
+      handleExtractSuccess(extractData, processedData, isFirstPage);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    handleExtractError(isFirstPage);
+  } catch {
+    handleExtractError(isFirstPage);
+  }
+}
+
+function shouldFetchBalance(status: PointsBalanceStatus): boolean {
+  return (
+    status !== PointsBalanceStatus.LOADING &&
+    status !== PointsBalanceStatus.SUCCESS
+  );
+}
+
+function handleBalanceSuccess(points?: number): void {
+  const { pointsExtractActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+  pointsExtractActions.setBalance(points);
+  eventServerResponse(ANALYTICS_EVENTS.BALANCE_SUCCESS);
+}
+
+function handleBalanceError(): void {
+  const { pointsExtractActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+  pointsExtractActions.setBalanceStatus(PointsBalanceStatus.ERROR);
+  eventServerResponse(ANALYTICS_EVENTS.BALANCE_ERROR);
+}
+
+export async function getPointsBalance(): Promise<void> {
+  const { pointsExtractActions, pointsBalance } = useRootStore.getState();
+
+  if (!shouldFetchBalance(pointsBalance.status)) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    pointsExtractActions.setBalanceStatus(PointsBalanceStatus.LOADING);
+
+    const response = await getPointsBalanceApi();
+    const returnCode =
+      response?.data?.status?.returnCode ??
+      response?.data?.status?.codigoRetorno;
+    const points = response?.data?.data?.points;
+
+    if (returnCode === EXTRACT_CONSTANTS.BALANCE_SUCCESS_RETURN_CODE) {
+      handleBalanceSuccess(points);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    handleBalanceError();
+  } catch {
+    handleBalanceError();
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import { marketplaceApi } from '../api';
+import { MarketplaceParams, MarketplaceStatus } from '../models';
+
+function shouldFetchMarketplace(): boolean {
+  const { marketplace } = useRootStore.getState();
+  return marketplace.status !== MarketplaceStatus.LOADING;
+}
+
+export async function getMarketplace(params: MarketplaceParams): Promise<void> {
+  if (!shouldFetchMarketplace()) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const { marketplaceActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+
+  try {
+    marketplaceActions.setStatus(MarketplaceStatus.LOADING);
+
+    const response = await marketplaceApi.getMarketplace(params);
+
+    if (response?.status?.codigoRetorno === 0) {
+      marketplaceActions.setData(response);
+    } else {
+      marketplaceActions.setError(response?.status?.mensagem);
+      marketplaceActions.setStatus(MarketplaceStatus.ERROR);
+    }
+  } catch (error) {
+    marketplaceActions.setError('Erro ao carregar marketplace');
+    marketplaceActions.setStatus(MarketplaceStatus.ERROR);
+  }
+}
+
+export function clearMarketplace(): void {
+  const { marketplaceActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+  marketplaceActions.reset();
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import { getParameterPointsProgramApi } from '../api';
+import { ParameterPointsProgramStatus } from '../models';
+import { mapParameterPointsProgramResponse } from '../repository';
+
+export async function getParameterPointsProgram(): Promise<void> {
+  const { parameterPointsProgramActions, parameterPointsProgram } =
+    useRootStore.getState();
+
+  if (
+    parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING ||
+    parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.SUCCESS
+  ) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    parameterPointsProgramActions.setStatus(
+      ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING,
+    );
+
+    const response = await getParameterPointsProgramApi();
+
+    if (response.status === 200 && response?.data?.length > 0) {
+      const data = mapParameterPointsProgramResponse(response.data);
+      parameterPointsProgramActions.setData(data);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    parameterPointsProgramActions.setStatus(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR);
+  } catch {
+    parameterPointsProgramActions.setStatus(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR);
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import { getPermissionApi, savePermissionApi } from '../api';
+import { PermissionStatus, type PermissionDocumentInput } from '../models';
+import { mapPermissionResponse } from '../repository';
+
+export async function checkHasRedeemed(accountId: string): Promise<boolean> {
+  const { rewardPermissionActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+
+  try {
+    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.LOADING);
+
+    const response = await getPermissionApi({ accountNumber: accountId });
+
+    if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 300 && response?.data) {
+      const permissionValue = mapPermissionResponse(response.data);
+      const redeemedAt =
+        permissionValue?.invoiceCashbackRedemption?.redeemedAtDate;
+      const hasRedeemed = Boolean(redeemedAt);
+
+      rewardPermissionActions.setHasRedeemed(hasRedeemed);
+      return hasRedeemed;
+    }
+
+    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.ERROR);
+    return false;
+  } catch {
+    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.ERROR);
+    return false;
+  }
+}
+
+export async function markAsRedeemed(accountId: string): Promise<boolean> {
+  const { rewardPermissionActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+
+  try {
+    const document: PermissionDocumentInput = {
+      codigoCliente: accountId,
+      status: 1,
+      value: JSON.stringify({
+        invoiceCashbackRedemption: {
+          redeemedAtDate: new Date().toISOString(),
+        },
+      }),
+    };
+
+    const response = await savePermissionApi(document);
+
+    if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 300) {
+      rewardPermissionActions.setHasRedeemed(true);
+      return true;
+    }
+
+    return false;
+  } catch {
+    return false;
+  }
+}

+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import { pointsProductsApi } from '../api';
+import { PointsProductsStatus } from '../models';
+import { mapPointsProductsResponse } from '../repository';
+import { getParticipantIdFromToken } from '../utils/participantId';
+
+function shouldFetchProducts(): boolean {
+  const { pointsProducts } = useRootStore.getState();
+  return pointsProducts.status !== PointsProductsStatus.LOADING;
+}
+
+export async function getPointsProducts(): Promise<void> {
+  if (!shouldFetchProducts()) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const { pointsProductsActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+
+  try {
+    pointsProductsActions.setStatus(PointsProductsStatus.LOADING);
+
+    const participantId = await getParticipantIdFromToken();
+    const response = await pointsProductsApi.getProducts(participantId);
+
+    if (response?.status?.codigoRetorno === 0) {
+      const products = mapPointsProductsResponse(response);
+      pointsProductsActions.setProducts(products);
+    } else {
+      pointsProductsActions.setError(response?.status?.mensagem);
+      pointsProductsActions.setStatus(PointsProductsStatus.ERROR);
+    }
+  } catch (error) {
+    pointsProductsActions.setError('Erro ao carregar produtos');
+    pointsProductsActions.setStatus(PointsProductsStatus.ERROR);
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+import { rescueApi } from '../api';
+import { RescueCallbacks, RescuePayload, RescueStatus } from '../models';
+import { getParticipantIdFromToken } from '../utils/participantId';
+
+export async function performRescue(
+  payload: RescuePayload,
+  callbacks?: RescueCallbacks,
+): Promise<void> {
+  const { rescueActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+
+  try {
+    rescueActions.setStatus(RescueStatus.LOADING);
+
+    const participantId =
+      payload.participantId || (await getParticipantIdFromToken());
+    const rescuePayload: RescuePayload = {
+      ...payload,
+      participantId,
+    };
+
+    const response = await rescueApi.rescue(rescuePayload);
+
+    if (response?.data?.status === 'OK' || response?.status?.message) {
+      rescueActions.setResponseStatus(response.status);
+      rescueActions.setStatus(RescueStatus.SUCCESS);
+      callbacks?.onSuccess?.(response.status);
+    } else {
+      rescueActions.setResponseStatus(response?.status);
+      rescueActions.setStatus(RescueStatus.ERROR);
+      callbacks?.onFailed?.(response?.status);
+    }
+  } catch (error) {
+    rescueActions.setError('Erro ao realizar resgate');
+    rescueActions.setStatus(RescueStatus.ERROR);
+    callbacks?.onFailed?.();
+  }
+}
+
+export function clearRescue(): void {
+  const { rescueActions } = useRootStore.getState();
+  rescueActions.reset();
+}

+import type { StateCreator } from 'zustand';
+import type { AirlineMilesActions, AirlineMilesState } from '../models';
+
+export type AirlineMilesSlice = {
+  airlineMiles: AirlineMilesState;
+  airlineMilesActions: AirlineMilesActions;
+};
+
+const initialAirlineMilesState: AirlineMilesState = {
+  redirectURL: '',
+  isLoading: false,
+  isError: false,
+  errorMessage: '',
+};
+
+export const createAirlineMilesSlice: StateCreator<
+  AirlineMilesSlice,
+  [],
+  [],
+  AirlineMilesSlice
+> = set => ({
+  airlineMiles: initialAirlineMilesState,
+  airlineMilesActions: {
+    setRedirectURL: url =>
+      set(state => ({
+        airlineMiles: {
+          ...state.airlineMiles,
+          redirectURL: url,
+          isLoading: false,
+          isError: false,
+          errorMessage: '',
+        },
+      })),
+    setLoading: isLoading =>
+      set(state => ({
+        airlineMiles: {
+          ...state.airlineMiles,
+          isLoading,
+          ...(isLoading && {
+            isError: false,
+            errorMessage: '',
+          }),
+        },
+      })),
+    setError: error =>
+      set(state => ({
+        airlineMiles: {
+          ...state.airlineMiles,
+          isLoading: false,
+          isError: true,
+          errorMessage: error,
+        },
+      })),
+    clearError: () =>
+      set(state => ({
+        airlineMiles: {
+          ...state.airlineMiles,
+          isError: false,
+          errorMessage: '',
+        },
+      })),
+    reset: () =>
+      set({
+        airlineMiles: initialAirlineMilesState,
+      }),
+  },
+});
diff --git a/src/services/store/extract.store.ts b/src/services/store/extract.store.ts
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..b1b5683a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/services/store/extract.store.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,190 @@
+import type { StateCreator } from 'zustand';
+import {
+  PointsBalanceStatus,
+  PointsExtractStatus,
+  type AppliedFilters,
+  type ExpiringFilters,
+  type PointsBalanceState,
+  type PointsExtractData,
+  type PointsExtractFiltersState,
+  type PointsExtractState,
+  type ProcessedExtractData,
+} from '../models';
+
+export interface PointsExtractActions {
+  setExtractStatus: (status: PointsExtractStatus) => void;
+  setExtractData: (
+    extractData: PointsExtractData,
+    processedExtractData?: ProcessedExtractData,
+  ) => void;
+  appendExtractData: (
+    extractData: PointsExtractData,
+    processedExtractData?: ProcessedExtractData,
+  ) => void;
+  setLoadingMore: (isLoading: boolean) => void;
+  setBalanceStatus: (status: PointsBalanceStatus) => void;
+  setBalance: (points?: number) => void;
+  setTransactionsFilters: (filters: AppliedFilters) => void;
+  clearTransactionsFilters: () => void;
+  setExpiringFilters: (filters: ExpiringFilters) => void;
+  clearExpiringFilters: () => void;
+  reset: () => void;
+}
+
+export interface PointsExtractSlice {
+  pointsExtract: PointsExtractState;
+  pointsBalance: PointsBalanceState;
+  pointsExtractFilters: PointsExtractFiltersState;
+  pointsExtractActions: PointsExtractActions;
+}
+
+const INITIAL_POINTS_EXTRACT_STATE: PointsExtractState = {
+  extractData: undefined,
+  processedExtractData: undefined,
+  status: PointsExtractStatus.IDLE,
+  isLoadingMore: false,
+  error: undefined,
+};
+
+const INITIAL_POINTS_BALANCE_STATE: PointsBalanceState = {
+  points: undefined,
+  status: PointsBalanceStatus.IDLE,
+  error: undefined,
+};
+
+const INITIAL_POINTS_EXTRACT_FILTERS_STATE: PointsExtractFiltersState = {
+  appliedTransactionsFilters: undefined,
+  appliedExpiringFilters: undefined,
+};
+
+export const createPointsExtractSlice: StateCreator<
+  PointsExtractSlice,
+  [],
+  [],
+  PointsExtractSlice
+> = set => ({
+  pointsExtract: INITIAL_POINTS_EXTRACT_STATE,
+  pointsBalance: INITIAL_POINTS_BALANCE_STATE,
+  pointsExtractFilters: INITIAL_POINTS_EXTRACT_FILTERS_STATE,
+  pointsExtractActions: {
+    setExtractStatus: status =>
+      set(state => ({
+        pointsExtract: {
+          ...state.pointsExtract,
+          status,
+          ...(status === PointsExtractStatus.IDLE ||
+          status === PointsExtractStatus.LOADING
+            ? { error: undefined }
+            : {}),
+        },
+      })),
+    setExtractData: (extractData, processedExtractData) =>
+      set(state => ({
+        pointsExtract: {
+          ...state.pointsExtract,
+          extractData,
+          processedExtractData,
+          status: PointsExtractStatus.SUCCESS,
+          isLoadingMore: false,
+          error: undefined,
+        },
+      })),
+    appendExtractData: (extractData, processedExtractData) =>
+      set(state => {
+        const existingTransactions =
+          state.pointsExtract.extractData?.transactions ?? [];
+        const newTransactions = extractData.transactions;
+        const mergedTransactions = [
+          ...existingTransactions,
+          ...newTransactions,
+        ];
+
+        const existingProcessed = state.pointsExtract.processedExtractData;
+        const newProcessed = processedExtractData;
+
+        let mergedProcessed: ProcessedExtractData | undefined;
+        if (existingProcessed && newProcessed) {
+          const existingMapped = existingProcessed.mappedTransactions ?? [];
+          const newMapped = newProcessed.mappedTransactions ?? [];
+          mergedProcessed = {
+            groupedTransactions: newProcessed.groupedTransactions,
+            mappedTransactions: [
+              ...existingMapped,
+              ...newMapped,
+            ],
+          };
+        } else {
+          mergedProcessed = newProcessed ?? existingProcessed;
+        }
+
+        return {
+          pointsExtract: {
+            ...state.pointsExtract,
+            extractData: {
+              transactions: mergedTransactions,
+              pagination: extractData.pagination,
+            },
+            processedExtractData: mergedProcessed,
+            isLoadingMore: false,
+          },
+        };
+      }),
+    setLoadingMore: isLoading =>
+      set(state => ({
+        pointsExtract: {
+          ...state.pointsExtract,
+          isLoadingMore: isLoading,
+        },
+      })),
+    setBalanceStatus: status =>
+      set(state => ({
+        pointsBalance: {
+          ...state.pointsBalance,
+          status,
+        },
+      })),
+    setBalance: points =>
+      set(state => ({
+        pointsBalance: {
+          ...state.pointsBalance,
+          points,
+          status: PointsBalanceStatus.SUCCESS,
+          error: undefined,
+        },
+      })),
+    setTransactionsFilters: filters =>
+      set(state => ({
+        pointsExtractFilters: {
+          ...state.pointsExtractFilters,
+          appliedTransactionsFilters: filters,
+        },
+      })),
+    clearTransactionsFilters: () =>
+      set(state => ({
+        pointsExtractFilters: {
+          ...state.pointsExtractFilters,
+          appliedTransactionsFilters: undefined,
+        },
+      })),
+    setExpiringFilters: filters =>
+      set(state => ({
+        pointsExtractFilters: {
+          ...state.pointsExtractFilters,
+          appliedExpiringFilters: filters,
+        },
+      })),
+    clearExpiringFilters: () =>
+      set(state => ({
+        pointsExtractFilters: {
+          ...state.pointsExtractFilters,
+          appliedExpiringFilters: undefined,
+        },
+      })),
+    reset: () =>
+      set({
+        pointsExtract: INITIAL_POINTS_EXTRACT_STATE,
+        pointsBalance: INITIAL_POINTS_BALANCE_STATE,
+        pointsExtractFilters: INITIAL_POINTS_EXTRACT_FILTERS_STATE,
+      }),
+  },
+});

+import type { StateCreator } from 'zustand';
+import type { MarketplaceActions, MarketplaceState } from '../models';
+import { MarketplaceStatus } from '../models';
+
+export type MarketplaceSlice = {
+  marketplace: MarketplaceState;
+  marketplaceActions: MarketplaceActions;
+};
+
+const initialMarketplaceState: MarketplaceState = {
+  status: MarketplaceStatus.IDLE,
+  data: null,
+  error: undefined,
+};
+
+export const createMarketplaceSlice: StateCreator<
+  MarketplaceSlice,
+  [],
+  [],
+  MarketplaceSlice
+> = set => ({
+  marketplace: initialMarketplaceState,
+  marketplaceActions: {
+    setStatus: status =>
+      set(state => ({
+        marketplace: {
+          ...state.marketplace,
+          status,
+          ...(status === MarketplaceStatus.LOADING && {
+            error: undefined,
+          }),
+        },
+      })),
+    setData: data =>
+      set(state => ({
+        marketplace: {
+          ...state.marketplace,
+          data,
+          status: MarketplaceStatus.SUCCESS,
+          error: undefined,
+        },
+      })),
+    setError: error =>
+      set(state => ({
+        marketplace: {
+          ...state.marketplace,
+          error,
+        },
+      })),
+    reset: () =>
+      set({
+        marketplace: initialMarketplaceState,
+      }),
+  },
+});

+import type { StateCreator } from 'zustand';

+  ParameterPointsProgramStatus,
+} from '../models';
+
+export interface ParameterPointsProgramActions {
+  setStatus: (status: ParameterPointsProgramStatus) => void;
+  setData: (data: ParameterPointsProgramResponse[]) => void;
+  setSelectedCategory: (
+    selectedCategory: ParameterPointsProgramResponse | undefined,
+  ) => void;
+  setPointsQuantity: (pointsQuantity: number) => void;
+  setConversionFactor: (conversionFactor: number) => void;
+  reset: () => void;
+}
+
+export interface ParameterPointsProgramSlice {
+  parameterPointsProgram: ParameterPointsProgramState;
+  parameterPointsProgramActions: ParameterPointsProgramActions;
+}
+
+const initialParameterPointsProgramState: ParameterPointsProgramState = {
+  status: ParameterPointsProgramStatus.IDLE,
+  data: undefined,
+  selectedCategory: undefined,
+  pointsQuantity: 0,
+  conversionFactor: 0.1,

+export const createParameterPointsProgramSlice: StateCreator<

+  [],

+        },
+      })),

+        parameterPointsProgram: {
+          ...state.parameterPointsProgram,
+          data,
+          status: ParameterPointsProgramStatus.SUCCESS,
+        },
+      })),

+      })),

+    setConversionFactor: (conversionFactor: number) =>

+        },
+      })),
+    reset: () =>
+      set({
+        parameterPointsProgram: initialParameterPointsProgramState,
+      }),
+  },
+});

@@ -0,0 +1,53 @@
+import type { StateCreator } from 'zustand';
+import type { RescueActions, RescueState } from '../models';
+import { RescueStatus } from '../models';
+
+export type RescueSlice = {
+  rescue: RescueState;
+  rescueActions: RescueActions;
+};
+
+const initialRescueState: RescueState = {
+  status: RescueStatus.IDLE,
+  responseStatus: undefined,
+  error: undefined,
+};
+
+export const createRescueSlice: StateCreator<
+  RescueSlice,
+  [],
+  [],
+  RescueSlice
+> = set => ({
+  rescue: initialRescueState,
+  rescueActions: {
+    setStatus: status =>
+      set(state => ({
+        rescue: {
+          ...state.rescue,
+          status,
+          ...(status === RescueStatus.LOADING && {
+            error: undefined,
+          }),
+        },
+      })),
+    setResponseStatus: responseStatus =>
+      set(state => ({
+        rescue: {
+          ...state.rescue,
+          responseStatus,
+        },
+      })),
+    setError: error =>
+      set(state => ({
+        rescue: {
+          ...state.rescue,
+          error,
+        },
+      })),
+    reset: () =>
+      set({
+        rescue: initialRescueState,
+      }),
+  },
+});

@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+import { StateCreator } from 'zustand';
+
+import {
+  AirlineMilesSlice,
+  createAirlineMilesSlice,
+  createMarketplaceSlice,
+  createParameterPointsProgramSlice,
+  createPermissionSlice,
+  createPointsExtractSlice,
+  createPointsProductsSlice,
+  createRescueSlice,
+  MarketplaceSlice,
+  ParameterPointsProgramSlice,
+  PermissionSlice,
+  PointsExtractSlice,
+  PointsProductsSlice,
+  RescueSlice,
+} from '../index';
+
+export type RewardsProgramRootStore = ParameterPointsProgramSlice &
+  PermissionSlice &
+  AirlineMilesSlice &
+  PointsExtractSlice &
+  PointsProductsSlice &
+  RescueSlice &
+  MarketplaceSlice;
+
+type Slice<T> = StateCreator<RewardsProgramRootStore, [], [], T>;
+const asSlice = <T>(slice: StateCreator<RewardsProgramRootStore, [], [], T>) =>
+  slice as Slice<T>;
+
+export function setRewardsProgramSlices<T extends RewardsProgramRootStore>(
+  ...a: Parameters<Slice<T>>
+) {
+  return {
+    ...asSlice<ParameterPointsProgramSlice>(createParameterPointsProgramSlice)(
+      ...a,
+    ),
+    ...asSlice<PermissionSlice>(createPermissionSlice)(...a),
+    ...asSlice<AirlineMilesSlice>(createAirlineMilesSlice)(...a),
+    ...asSlice<PointsExtractSlice>(createPointsExtractSlice)(...a),
+    ...asSlice<PointsProductsSlice>(createPointsProductsSlice)(...a),
+    ...asSlice<RescueSlice>(createRescueSlice)(...a),
+    ...asSlice<MarketplaceSlice>(createMarketplaceSlice)(...a),
+  };
+}

+import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
+
+export function clearRewardsProgramStore() {
+  const {
+    parameterPointsProgramActions,
+    rewardPermissionActions,
+    airlineMilesActions,
+    pointsExtractActions,
+    pointsProductsActions,
+    rescueActions,
+    marketplaceActions,
+  } = useRootStore.getState();
+
+  parameterPointsProgramActions.reset();
+  rewardPermissionActions.reset();
+  airlineMilesActions.reset();
+  pointsExtractActions.reset();
+  pointsProductsActions.reset();
+  rescueActions.reset();
+  marketplaceActions.reset();
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+import jwt_decode from 'jwt-decode';
+import storage from '~/redux/store/storage';
+
+interface DecodedToken {
+  NRC?: string;
+}
+
+export async function getParticipantIdFromToken(): Promise<string | undefined> {
+  try {
+    const accessTokenApp = await storage.getItem('accessToken');
+    if (!accessTokenApp) {
+      return undefined;
+    }
+
+    const decoded = jwt_decode(accessTokenApp) as DecodedToken;
+    return decoded?.NRC;
+  } catch {
+    return undefined;
+  }
+}

diff --git a/src/utils/functions.ts b/src/utils/functions.ts
new file mode 100644

--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/utils/functions.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,68 @@
+type CurrencyValue = number | undefined | string;
+
+export const formatToCurrency = (fullValue: CurrencyValue): string => {
+  if (typeof fullValue === 'undefined') return `R$ 0,00`;
+
+  const [value, cents] = String(fullValue).replace('-', '').split('.');
+
+  const formattedCents = cents ? cents.padEnd(2, '0') : '00';
+  let formattedValue = '';
+
+  for (let i = 0; i < value.length; i += 1) {
+    const currentDigit = value[value.length - 1 - i];
+
+    if (i > 0 && i % 3 === 0) {
+      formattedValue = `${currentDigit}.${formattedValue}`;
+    } else {
+      formattedValue = `${currentDigit}${formattedValue}`;
+    }
+  }
+
+  return `R$ ${Number(fullValue) >= 0 ? '' : '-'}${formattedValue},${formattedCents[0]}${
+    formattedCents[1]
+  }`;
+};
+
+export function sanitizeTaxonomy(text: string): string {
+  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') {
+    return '';
+  }
+
+  return text
+    .toLowerCase()
+    .normalize('NFD')
+    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
+    .replace(/[^\w\s]/g, '')
+    .replace(/\s+/g, '_')
+    .replace(/_+/g, '_')
+    .replace(/^_/, '')
+    .replace(/_$/, '');
+}
+
+export const getFormattedPoints = (n: number) => {
+  const nfPtBR = new Intl.NumberFormat('pt-BR');
+  return nfPtBR.format(Math.max(0, Math.floor(n || 0)));
+};
+
+export const getParsedCurrency = (text: string) => {
+  const digits = (text || '').replace(/\D/g, '');
+  const n = parseInt(digits, 10);
+  if (Number.isNaN(n)) {
+    return 0;
+  }
+  return n / 100;
+};
+
+export const getParsePoints = (text: string) => {
+  const digits = (text || '').replace(/\D/g, '');
+  const n = parseInt(digits, 10);
+  return Number.isNaN(n) ? 0 : n;
+};
+
+export const formatCurrencyBR = (n: number) =>
+  new Intl.NumberFormat('pt-BR', {
+    style: 'currency',
+    currency: 'BRL',
+  })
+    .format(Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0)
+    .replace(/\s/g, '');
